Name: Alstom
Description: Rail has the power to shape how societies grow, connect, and decarbonise. At Alstom, we turn this potential into reality, moving over 100 million people daily with safe, smart, and sustainable mobility solutions.

Name: Elevadores Atlas Schindler (Brazil)
Description:
The Elevadores Atlas Schindler, a member of the Swiss Schindler Group, is a company that has more than 135 years with a worldwide presence manufacturing, maintaining and modernizing elevators, escalators and moving walks. 

Being considered the best brand in its segment in Brazil according to PINI research, the most prestigious supplier’s survey within the construction business, the company has two factories, one localized in Londrina and another one in São Paulo achieving approximately 4700 employees in over 150 branches spread throughout the Brazilian territory.

Name: Jardine Schindler Group
Description:
Founded in 1974, Jardine Schindler Group (JSG) is a Joint Venture between Jardine Matheson in Hong Kong and Schindler Group located Switzerland, who between them bring over 300 years of experience in business management, regional specialization and engineering excellence. 

Headquartered in Hong Kong, JSG employs close to 6000 employees to design, engineer, install, maintain and modernize elevators, escalators and moving walkways in Brunei, Cambodia, Hong Kong, Macau, Malaysia, Myanmar, Indonesia, the Philippines, Singapore, Thailand and Vietnam.

Name: Vontier
Description: We’re a global technology company focused on transportation and mobility. Our businesses are all industry leaders in their sectors – across convenience retail, mobility infrastructure, retail and commercial fueling, fleet management and vehicle maintenance and repair. We are leading the way to smarter transportation for a growing, connected world.

Name: Schindler France
Description:
Fondé en Suisse en 1874, le Groupe Schindler constitue aujourd’hui l’un des principaux fournisseurs mondiaux d’ascenseurs, d’escaliers mécaniques, de trottoirs roulants et de produits permettant, par exemple, la gestion de la mobilité dans un bâtiment. Les solutions de mobilité Schindler transportent 2 milliards de personnes chaque jour dans le monde. Présent dans plus de 100 pays, le Groupe Schindler compte 69 000 collaborateurs qui construisent le succès de l’entreprise et qui interviennent aux niveaux de la production, du montage, de l’entretien et de la modernisation.

En France, ce sont 3000 collaborateurs qui s’engagent tout au long de l’année pour garantir une prestation de qualité dans un parc de plus de 100000 appareils - ascenseurs, escaliers mécaniques, trottoirs roulants, portes & automatismes.

Name: Schindler Aufzüge AG (Switzerland)
Description:
Behind Schindler Aufzüge AG are approximately 2,500 employees and over 300 apprentices, who help make our company the undisputed number one in the Swiss elevator business. Professional training courses (Lift Camps) that are mandatory for all new members of staff allow us to ensure that our client-facing employees are trained to the very highest level. Schindler is also a pioneer in the digitalization of the elevator business. With the Schindler Ahead range of products, the PORT Technology destination-dispatch system, and the online planning navigator for architects and planners, Schindler is a worldwide leader in the digitalization of the elevator industry.

Become part of a globally successful Swiss family company and apply via our online portal at job.schindler.com.

Name: Frauscher Sensor Technology
Description: Frauscher Sensor Technology provides the world’s most reliable field elements for train detection and wayside object controlling. Additionally, our portfolio includes software-, connectivity- and data transmission solutions combined with data-based, smart life cycle services. With locations and partners all over the globe, we guarantee a strong supply chain and optimal customer support. Together, we form the trusted foundation operators need to run their rail networks with confidence.

Name: Montele Elevadores
Description:
Desde 1982 a Montele é referência nacional para elevadores e plataformas de acessibilidade. Fomos pioneiros em todos os equipamentos que comercializamos, com inovações e patentes. Fabricamos a primeira plataforma elevatória há mais de 30 anos e criamos o nosso próprio sistema de monitoramento remoto de elevadores pela internet, com milhões de viagens registradas em tempo real.

Desenvolvemos nossas operações de manufatura em Contagem/MG e em campo por todo o Brasil, chegando no marco de 1.000 instalações em um ano. Em 2025 ultrapassamos 15.000 clientes atendidos. Nossos elevadores estão em grandes organizações, residências icônicas e nos pontos turísticos mais reconhecidos.

Nossa realidade é o desafio de fornecimentos com prazos curtos, atendimentos criteriosos e a garantia da segurança e durabilidade superior que os clientes esperam da marca Montele.

Name: Wielton SA
Description:
Wielton S.A. z siedzibą w Wieluniu to największy polski producent naczep, przyczep i zabudów. Spółka notowana na Giełdzie Papierów Wartościowych w Warszawie należy do grona dziesięciu największych producentów w swojej branży na świecie. Klientami Wieltonu są firmy transportowe, budowlane, produkcyjne, dystrybucyjne i rolnicze. Grupa Wielton posiada cztery centra produkcyjne: w Polsce, Niemczech, we Francji oraz Wielkiej Brytanii, a także dwie montownie: we Włoszech i w Rosji. Pod koniec 2016 r. Wielton uruchomił spółkę zależną na Wybrzeżu Kości Słoniowej.
 
W ramach całej Grupy zatrudnienie znajduje obecnie ok. 3 tys. pracowników, przy czym najwięcej, bo aż 1,7 tys. w Wieluniu. W 2016 r. w Wieluniu Wielton otworzył Centrum Badawczo-Rozwojowe. Inwestycje w badania i rozwój to dla spółki istotny element strategii. Już dziś firma współpracuje z instytutami i uczelniami w Polsce i za granicą, a Dział Badań i Rozwoju posiada jedyną w Polsce, a drugą w Europie stację do całopojazdowego badania naczep, która umożliwia wykrywanie ewentualnych usterek już na etapie testów produkowanych pojazdów. Oferta Grupy Wielton z roku na rok się poszerza i zostaje wzbogacona o nowe produkty. Klienci mogą wybierać spośród 12 grup pojazdów, dostępnych w 800 konfiguracjach. Siłą Grupy jest konsekwentnie realizowana strategia, oparta na rozwoju organicznym i akwizycjach. W 2015 r. Grupa nabyła wiodące włoskie marki Viberti i Cardi. W maju 2017 r. Grupa Wielton przejęła niemiecką spółkę Langendorf, dzięki czemu poszerzyła swoją ofertę m.in. o specjalistyczne pojazdy do przewozu szkła i prefabrykatów betonowych, a w ostatnim kwartale 2017 roku sfinalizowała akwizycję 100% udziałów we francuskiej spółce Fruehauf. Przejęcie spółki Lawrence David we wrześniu 2018 r. pozwoliło wzbogacić ofertę Grupy o kolejne unikalne pojazdy.

Name: Vossloh Switch Systems
Description:
The Vossloh Switch Systems division develops and manufactures switch systems for rail infrastructure, which must be individually adapted to the customer and the project. Installation and maintenance are related Vossloh services.

Vossloh is a worldwide leading manufacturer of switch systems. At over 30 production sites in over 20 countries Vossloh manufactures, amongst other things, turnouts and crossings, manganese frogs, switch blade, switch actuators and locking devices, signalling products and rail monitoring systems. The Vossloh offer covers all fields of application: standard, high-speed, special and heavy haul switches in accordance with all international standards, as well as solutions for urban networks.

Imprint: https://www.vossloh.com/en/imprint/

Name: PT. Berca Schindler Lifts
Description:
For over 25 years, Berca Schindler Lifts has been a pioneer in shaping Indonesia's urban mobility landscape. As a joint venture between Central Cipta Murdaya (CCM)  and Jardine Schindler Group, we combine local expertise with global innovation to deliver safe, reliable, and efficient mobility solutions. We are dedicated to prioritizing safety, providing durable and dependable equipment, embracing cutting-edge technologies, and building long-lasting relationships with our customers through exceptional service and support.

We offer a comprehensive range of products and services, including elevators tailored to diverse needs, escalators and moving walks that enhance accessibility and convenience, modernization, and maintenance services, and 24/7 customer support. With a team of over 600 employees spanning East to West Indonesia, we are committed to providing exceptional service and support across the country.

As Indonesia continues to grow, we are committed to playing a pivotal role in shaping its urban mobility landscape. We strive to be the leading provider of innovative and sustainable mobility solutions, connecting people and communities while contributing to a better future for all.

Join us as we continue to elevate Indonesia, one journey at a time.

#BercaSchindlerLifts #ElevatingIndonesia #MobilitySolutions #Innovation #Sustainability

Description: Driving innovation for Mobility.

Name: GCK
Description: Green Corp Konnection is an ecosystem of industrial companies at the forefront of the sustainable energy revolution across the storage and supply of green energy and e-mobility.

Name: Elevadores Schindler Mexico
Description:
En 1944 a través de una representación llegan a México los primeros elevadores Schindler. En 1954 se constituye "Ascensores Schindler Mexicana, S.A." que operaba en la Calle de Vallarta No. 1, cerca del Monumento a la Revolución.

En 1970 la compañía se traslada a una planta industrial mas amplia y moderna. Mas tarde en 1989, la Compañía cambia de nombre a "Elevadores Schindler, S.A. de C.V." razón social actual de la compañía. En enero del 2002 Schindler México descentraliza sus operaciones en la zona metropolitana y establece sucursales en el interior del país.

Hoy somos más de 900 Colaboradores, especialistas en diferentes disciplinas enfocados en ofrecer el mejor servicio a nuestros Clientes y usuarios.

Somos Schindler México, Somos Tu Primera Opción.
Location: Naucalpan de Juárez, Estado de México

Name: Ibiporã Implementos
Description:
Com mais de 30 anos de mercado, hoje a Ibiporã produz implementos rodoviários de diversos tipos, baús e carretas para cargas secas, graneleiras, siders, baús frigoríficos lisos e estruturados e, em especial, baús e carretas frigoríficas para o transporte de carnes penduradas. 

Resistência e durabilidade são as características da marca, que tem como foco a fabricação de implementos robustos, reforçados e altamente duráveis. Em mais de duas décadas a Ibiporã ampliou sua área de instalação de 3 mil para 160 mil metros quadrados além da produção que atualmente ultrapassa a entrega de 150 implementos por mês.

Somos também uma empresa apaixonada por pessoas, que coloca em primeiro lugar sempre o bem-estar dos colaboradores. Pensando nisso oferecemos a todos a possibilidade de realizarem exames de rotina em nosso ambulatório, além de outros programas de cuidados com a saúde.

Buscamos atender nossos clientes de maneira próxima a amigável, sempre valorizando nossas parcerias. Os exames de rotina no ambulatório também são oferecidos para os motoristas que ficam na empresa esperando seus implementos. 

Sabemos que nossos implementos têm a qualidade necessária para irem muito mais longe, mas, além disso, sabemos que se trabalharmos juntos todos nós vamos muito mais longe!

Name: LB Foster
Description:
Today’s infrastructure is built on L.B. Foster’s legacy. For more than a century, our company has provided the materials necessary to construct and maintain major transportation, construction, recreation and agriculture projects.

L.B. Foster operates individual business units that specialize in Rail and Infrastructure products and services. These segments manage engineering, manufacturing, distribution and sales facilities worldwide. We also function as a distributor and service provider in strategic alliances with industry leading manufacturing and engineering firms.

Our company maintains ongoing programs that enhance product quality, improve operational processes and assure employee safety. L.B. Foster is committed to providing superior products for our customers, an entrepreneurial climate for our employees and exceptional value for our stakeholders.

L.B. Foster has been traded publicly since 1981 on the NASDAQ with the ticker symbol FSTR.

Name: CAI International, Inc.
Description: CAI International Inc. is a global transportation company offering intermodal container leasing and sales. Established in 1989 and headquartered in San Francisco, with offices around the world and a broad network of agents, depots, and carriers. CAI serves hundreds of the world's leading shipping lines, shippers, and logistics users. With three decades of transportation expertise, CAI guides the way in container sales and leasing. To keep your business moving ahead, CAI delivers innovative leasing and sales solutions. We’d love to hear about your business and what makes it go.

Name: Schindler Ltd (UK & Ireland)
Description:
Founded in Switzerland in 1874, the Schindler Group is a leading global provider of elevators, escalators and related services. Schindler mobility solutions move more than two billion people every day all over the world. Behind the company's success are over 69,000 employees in more than 100 countries.

We shape the skyline. Lifts escalators make tall buildings liveable and large infrastructure projects accessible. Vertical transportation has allowed the steel-frame skyscraper to give new shape and substance to global cities and enables the rapid expansion of new dynamic urban areas.

Increasing urbanisation will not only push horizontal limits of existing cities but their vertical boundaries as well – refashioning both their skylines and public transportation networks with the enabling power of lifts and escalators.

This new way of living will only be possible with smart mobility solutions. We at Schindler UK and Ireland have the expertise and product selection to make every type of facility found in cities – and elsewhere – easily and safely accessible.

In the UK, we’re over 500 people all working together to make sure our customers are able to move around safely and seamlessly. 

Schindler Ltd strives to be the preferred employer within our industry and within the UK and Ireland.  We promote diversity and equal opportunities across all areas of recruitment and development. We believe that by developing the skills of our employees to create high levels of motivation and performance, we will allow them to reach their full potential.

Name: Mobi Latam
Description: We are an electric mobility startup transforming the last-mile industry. We connect riders with delivery platforms, offering job opportunities through a monthly subscription model that improves and simplifies the work experience for couriers

Name: ITD Industries Inc.
Description: ITD is an industry leading commercial transportation equipment manufacturer and technology business. Our Company's strength lies in our rich history of innovative product development, the diversity and passion of our talented team, and deep-rooted commitment to the success of our customers and the communities they serve. Our strategic investments in smart and electric trailer technology will help to power our customers shift to a cleaner more sustainable future.

Name: Groupe VINCENT
Description:
Le groupe VINCENT, constructeur carrossier et distributeur exclusif des marques PALFINGER, PRESTO, VINCENT et SENNEBOGEN  est aujourd’hui un des leaders du marché français du levage, du carrossage et de la manutention. 

Issus du charronnage puis de la carrosserie industrielle, les dirigeants historiques ont, depuis plus de cent quarante ans, développé l’esprit de service et le savoir faire VINCENT en s’attachant à maintenir en permanence le juste équilibre entre innovation et valorisation de l’expérience.

Cinquième génération de cette construction familiale, les dirigeants actuels accordent la même attention aux évolutions des besoins et des pratiques et sont personnellement engagés dans le développement des structures techniques et du professionnalisme des femmes et des hommes qui les entourent.


Pour continuer notre croissance, nous intégrons en permanence de nouvelles compétences. La diversité de nos activités et la variété de nos métiers permettent à des candidats de valeur d’envisager des carrières évolutives et personnalisées.

Que vous soyez débutant ou professionnel confirmé dans nos métiers ; 
Si vous partagez notre culture et souhaitez vous engager à nos cotés ; 
Envisageons ensemble l’opportunité d’une future collaboration.

Name: GAYA
Description: La marque française de vélos biplaces et triplaces, connectés et durables, pour simplifier la vi(ll)e des familles urbain·e·s.

Name: Schindler Malaysia
Description:
About Schindler:
Schindler is a leading global provider of elevator and escalator solutions, committed to enhancing urban mobility and improving the quality of life for people worldwide. With over 140 years of experience in the industry, Schindler has become synonymous with innovation, reliability, and sustainability. Schindler Malaysia was established back in 1974 as authorized distributor and service provider for Schindler elevators and escalators for the whole of Malaysia.

Moving more than one and a half billion people each day worldwide, our products can be found in many well-known buildings across Malaysia, including offices, residential buildings, airports, shopping centers, retail establishments and specialty buildings.

Our Mission:
At Schindler, our mission is to move more than two billion people every day safely, smoothly, and efficiently. We understand the vital role elevators and escalators play in modern cities, and we are dedicated to providing intelligent and sustainable mobility solutions that meet the evolving needs of urban environments.

Our Solutions: 
Schindler offers a comprehensive range of products and services designed to optimize vertical transportation in buildings of all types and sizes. Whether it's a commercial skyscraper, a residential complex, or a public transportation hub, our innovative elevators, escalators, and moving walks deliver superior performance, comfort, and energy efficiency.

Our Commitment to Sustainability:
As a responsible corporate citizen, Schindler is committed to minimizing our environmental footprint and contributing to a more sustainable future. We continuously invest in research and development to create energy-efficient solutions, reduce emissions, and promote recycling and waste reduction throughout our operations.

At Schindler, our mission is to keep the world moving. 

We Elevate… Our World

Name: Schindler Lifts (Singapore) Pte Ltd
Description:
We are a team of 500 dedicated employees who give our very best to delight our customers, making Schindler a leader in the elevator and escalator industry in Singapore. No wonder more than one and half billion people worldwide trust Schindler to move them each day.

Our Products - Elevator, Escalator & Moving Walks
Schindler mobility solutions provide access for people. We help architects, owners and builders add value to any building type – from first sketches in planning to operation and modernization. Our products, technologies and services are recognized as a benchmark for quality and safety. Schindler elevators, escalators and moving walks. 

Schindler Lifts (S) Pte Ltd was established in 1975, a year after Jardine Matheson of Hong Kong and Schindler Holding of Switzerland embarked on a joint venture to market Schindler lifts and escalators in the Asia Pacific region and to provide after sales maintenance services for its range of products. Our principal activities now include the sales, installation, repair, maintenance and modernization of Schindler elevators, escalators and passenger conveyors.


We Elevate...Singapore

Name: Schindler Lifts NZ Ltd
Description:
Founded in Switzerland in 1874, the Schindler Group is a leading global provider of elevators, escalators and related services. Our innovative and environmentally-friendly access and transit-management systems make an important contribution to mobility in urban societies.

Schindler mobility solutions move more than two billion people every day all over the world. Behind the company's success are over 60,000 employees in more than 100 countries.

Schindler products can be found in many well-known buildings throughout New Zealand, including office buildings, airports, shopping centres/retail establishments and specialty buildings.

In New Zealand, we employ over 100 people across our branches in Auckland, Hamilton, Wellington & Christchurch.

We maintain elevators, escalators and moving walks across New Zealand, providing 24 hours a day, 7 days a week and 365 days a year breakdown service.

We Elevate... you

Name: AS Aufzüge AG
Description:
There is no shortage of elevator manufacturers. And there are many different elevator types. But if you what are looking for is a tailored elevator solution or a service partner for a range of brands and models, then there is only one place to go in Switzerland.  

Design your own individual career path in our friendly and uncomplicated working environment. Join AS Aufzüge and tap into a whole range of new development perspectives. As an apprentice, as a latecomer to the industry – no matter, we’re behind you.

Alongside training, the secret to our success is the continual professional development of our employees. Which is why, throughout our organization, you will find design engineers with an installation background, former service technicians who have transferred to sales, and one-time mechanics working in marketing. In other words: real professionals.

Interested? Apply here: lift.ch/jobs-de

Name: Schwihag
Description:
SCHWIHAG was founded 1971 in Tägerwilen - Switzerland. Experts in permanent way technology since 1971. The goal from start-up was to develop technical solutions and to advance existing technologies to advance the functionality of switches and tracks, to reduce the maintenance costs and to protect environment.
 
All over the world high-speed lines, heavy freight transport, tramway, underground and metro systems rely on our cutting-edge products to provide solutions to every challenge. Renowned for their integrity, reliability and durability, SCHWIHAG products offer outstanding quality, allowing our customers to meet the increasingly complex demands of modern infrastructure systems in the most practical and cost effective manner.
 
Our key components ensure a permanent reduction in maintenance costs, and at the same time can be relied on to increase the availability of the network. All SCHWIHAG products are easy to install, easy to inspect, maintenance free and, thanks to our focus on sustainability, environmentally-friendly too.

Name: Procor Limited

Why join Procor?

Experience the excitement of working for a company that is an industry leader in the business of leasing and maintaining rail cars, serving rail shippers. Name: ICC-IMS
Description:
ICC-IMS is at the forefront of technology, offering cutting-edge equipment, software, and consulting services. From state DOTs to municipalities, our solutions pave the way for safer, smarter, and more sustainable infrastructure. We provide services and equipment to governments and civil engineering consultants. 

With ICC’s distinguished 50-year legacy, it has led the charge in manufacturing cutting-edge data collection equipment, delivering to over 700 clients in 70 countries worldwide and setting industry benchmarks for accuracy and reliability. Simultaneously, IMS, with nearly four decades of consulting engineering expertise, has been a guiding light and partner to over 1,000 county and municipal agencies with infrastructure to manage.

In 2022, ICC acquired IMS, creating a formidable alliance. This union not only combines the precision engineering of ICC’s data collection equipment with IMS'  rich history of informed decision-making but also solidifies a cohesive powerhouse committed to advancing pavement management practices. 

Our shared history is not merely a chronicle of years but a narrative of resilience, innovation, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. As we embark on this collective journey, the merger of ICC and IMS symbolizes more than the sum of our years—it signifies a unified force that is poised to redefine the landscape of the pavement industry and build upon our legacy for years to come.

Our skilled team includes hardware engineers, software engineers, pavement engineers, mechanical and electrical technicians, field operators, customer support specialists, quality control staff, and other dedicated team members.

Name: OB Traffic
Description:
We are single-mindedly driven by an idea that others in the ITS industry have referred to as "crazy" and a "waste of time". 

What is our world shattering "crazy" idea? We actually talk to folks and listen when they speak. 

We do not blindly pester our customers, clients and friends with the constant annoyance of "BUY THIS, BUY THAT". We do not push folks into purchasing a bland, white-bread, low quality product just for the sake of profit (we would never represent such a product).  

How do we communicate with folks? We ask about their problems, we actively listen, we ask detailed questions, and then we provide a potential solution (By “problems”, we’re referring to work projects or products, but we're always here if you want to talk about other stuff too).

If we do not provide the product or service that solves your problem, we provide you with contact info to a company or individual who can. Heck, we will even do an introduction. 

Do we profit in these cases? No. 
Do we care? No.

What do we care about? 
At the end of a long work day, while you're sitting on your porch as the sun is setting on the horizon (hopefully not staring into it), and smiling because you’re happy. You’re happy because a major pain-point in the posterior of your work was removed. 

We do not pitch products. 
We deliver solutions. 

Maybe it's just us, but helping folks is not something we consider a "crazy waste of time".

Name: Schindler Nordics

Đến năm 1998, Schindler đã xây dựng nhà máy sản xuất tại Việt Nam chuyên sản xuất khung, dầm hỗ trợ trong việc lắp đặt nhằm tạo sự thuận tiện cho các công trình trong và ngoài nước.

Jardine Schindler Việt Nam có trụ sở chính tại Tp. Hồ Chí Minh và chi nhánh tại Hà Nội, Đà Nẵng, ngoài ra còn có văn phòng đại diện tại Cần Thơ, Hải Phòng và Nha Trang.
_______

Schindler was one of the first foreign-owned elevator companies to start operating in Vietnam, back in 1996. Name: LOVIS, LLC
Description:
LOVIS, LLC builds smarter, safer, and more sustainable hardware systems for industrial fleets. Our disruptive technology accelerates electrification of auxiliary systems while lowering total cost of ownership. Our product family—DryDrive, PowerDrive, EcoDrive, and RefrigerationDrive—electrifies auxiliary loads, reduces fuel, eliminates hydraulic spills, and increases uptime across trucking, construction, public works, agriculture, military, and energy.

DryDrive — A PTO-powered electric pumping system with two designs—gear-pump (crude) and vacuum-pump (produced water/used oil/grease). Delivers constant-rate pumping for faster load/unload and major fuel savings while reducing spill exposure—disruptive technology that replaces wet-kits.

PowerDrive — An onboard, PTO-powered AC system (10–100 kW; 120/240 V single-phase; optional 208 V three-phase) that replaces tow behind generators. Cuts logistics and fuel, supports hybrid silent runtime with EcoDrive, and brings reliable field power—even for military/expeditionary use.

EcoDrive — A rapid-install hybrid kit that powers PTO and provides electric assist to OEM drivetrain, regenerative braking, and 240 V charging. Eliminates idle fuel consumption and improves fuel mileage by up to 4× reduces maintenance and noise, and improves urban compliance.

RefrigerationDrive — A battery-assisted electric replacement for diesel TRUs with PTO and grid charging (optional solar). Delivers up to 2× fuel efficiency and significant annual savings, with app-visible temperatures/alerts and no diesel TRU fire/spill risks.

Core Technologies
PTO-driven generation • High-voltage electric drive • Battery storage (up to ~70 kW on EcoDrive) • Regenerative braking • AC outputs (120/240 V single-phase, 208 V three-phase; configuration dependent) • CAN/J1939 integration • App/telematics for usage, temperatures, faults, and location

Name: Soudure Brault
Description:
Chef de file et entreprise de renommée dans la fabrication mécano-soudée d’aluminium, Soudure Brault inc. se distingue de la compétition par son expertise et par la qualité de ses produits. Au fil des années, l’entreprise a su répondre aux normes de l’industrie et s’adapter aux exigences du marché pour ainsi fidéliser et garder une relation de confiance envers sa clientèle.  

Toujours dans le but d’offrir un produit de qualité, nos opérations sont certifiées selon les normes CWB, CSA 47.1, CSA 47.2 en plus de la norme ISO 9001. De plus, nous offrons des services de réparation et de modification d’équipements, de sablage au jet, de peinture, de découpe plasma et de pliage.  

Notre objectif pour les prochaines années serait d’automatiser certains de nos procédés afin de rester à la fine pointe des technologies de notre industrie. Ce virage nous permettrait d’être encore plus compétitif dans notre offre aux clients ; en réduisant nos délais, en augmentant notre capacité de production et en offrant plus de possibilité pour le client. 

Pourquoi l’aluminium? L’aluminium rentabilise les performances à long terme, réduit l’entretien, respecte l’environnement, possède une valeur résiduelle ainsi qu’une apparence esthétique durable. Nos produits sont fabriqués à partir d’aluminium de qualité supérieure, soit de grade série 5000 et 6000 ( grades maritimes ); ce qui rend nos fabrications plus robustes et durables.

Name: GiGi Nederland B.V.
Description:
De GiGi is een nieuwe, duurzame mobiliteitsoplossing voor onder meer forenzen, recreanten, binnenstadbewoners én zakelijke rijders. Door haar vernuftige vouwconstructie is de ingeklapte scooter even groot als een koffer (84 x 73 x 33 cm). De berijder kan zijn GiGi daardoor makkelijk meenemen in de trein en de metro, op de boot of in de auto. Er zijn slechts drie stappen en vijf seconden nodig om GiGi in te klappen.
 
De ingeklapte scooter neemt weinig ruimte in en is daardoor makkelijk te stallen in de hal van een woning, op kantoor of in een restaurant. Opladen kan in elk 220V-stopcontact en kost slechts drie uur. Op een volle accu kan de rijder een uur lang op top snelheid rijden. De GiGi rijdt net zo comfortabel als een reguliere scooter en haalt met gemak de 25 kilometer per uur. De elektrische scooter stoot geen schadelijke stoffen uit.
 
De GiGi voldoet aan alle Europese eisen en is ook uitgebreid getest door een omvangrijk testpanel. De scooter is direct leverbaar en komt in verschillende kleuren.

Description:

El proyecto HIMUGI es parte del programa HAZITEK 2024 del Gobierno Vasco. Name: STRAVION
Description:
Transforming Navigation & Situational Awareness with Intelligent and Advanced Vision Systems

We deliver cutting-edge, AI-powered vision solutions utilizing thermal imaging and day/night camera systems, along with GPS, motion sensors and radar to give operators unmatched clarity, coverage, and confidence. Unlike traditional cameras, our technology delivers a dynamic, data-driven visual experience—enabling faster, smarter decision-making when every moment counts.

Our systems offer up to 360° situational awareness, detecting people, vessels, markers, and hazards with real-time distance, speed, and positional data. Name: Rhino Berlin
Description:
Rhino-Berlin has been manufacturing robust aluminium containers / built-ups / boxes for cargobikes since 2015, which have to withstand the toughest demands in commercial operations on a daily basis. 

The high-quality boxes are available in various volume sizes (180-450 litres), equipment variants (e.g. subdivision system / drawers) and are always supplied with a burglar-proof lock. Customised painting or complete transfer of the corporate design to the outer skin of the boxes is standard. 

The lockable box remains watertight even in pouring rain without becoming waterlogged. The central element is the lid, which can be extended on rails and can hold up to 35kg, serving as an extended work surface. 

The box is 100% made in Berlin and is used by small craft businesses as well as large logistics companies such as DHL and is distributed worldwide.

Name: Hydrocool Systems
Description:

Designed to directly replace traditional diesel-powered reefers, our technology delivers zero-emission, low-noise, high-performance refrigeration for 53’ trailers and other standard applications.

As Canada—and the world—moves toward sustainable transportation, we’re proud to lead the transition in refrigerated logistics. Our systems support ambitious climate goals while offering immediate economic and operational benefits to fleet operators, logistics providers, and retailers.

Based in Ontario, we are part of a growing ecosystem supporting the hydrogen economy, working alongside public and private partners to build infrastructure, support clean energy jobs, and scale adoption.

Whether you manage a fleet, supply chain, or sustainability mandate, Hydrocool Systems offers a practical, future-ready solution to decarbonize your cold transport.

Hydrogen is happening—join us in building the future of clean transportation tech.

Name: Kingsrød ApS
Description:
Siden 1938 har Kingsrød transporteret gods i Skandinavien og Europa, med præcision og pålidelighed. Sammen står vi som markedsledende leverandører af hestelastbiler og motorsportslastbiler i Skandinavien, og vi har over 40 års erfaring med salg af lastbiler i alle størrelser til heste. I de seneste 40 år har vi opbygget indgående erfaring med salg af nye og brugte lastbiler, samt etableret både værksted og service.

Vores biler opbygges af Europas førende leverandører. Dette giver dig som bruger af bilerne, en tryghed for kvalitet, og sikrer dig en god gensalgsværdi. Varemærkerne har alle deres styrker, og med flere brands sikrer det et bredt sortiment af biler, der giver dig mulighed for at transportere fra 2 til 10 heste, eller flere biler, og indrettet præcis som du ønsker det.

Os der arbejder hos Kingsrød har mange års erfaring med heste, transport og ridesport/motorsport. Mange af os er aktive eller har været det, og arbejder internationalt. Det gør at vi kender til de krav der er til lastbilerne, og hvor vigtigt det er med god sikkerhed, funktionalitet og komfort.

Vores erfaring - Din tryghed.

Vi byder dig velkommen hos Kingsrød.

Name: HYVA MAROC
Description:
Fondé en 1979, Hyva est aujourd’hui l’un des premiers fournisseurs au monde de solutions de transport innovantes et extrêmement efficaces destinées aux industries des véhicules commerciaux et des services environnementaux. Avec plus de 25 000 clients et plus de 40 % des parts du marché des solutions hydrauliques mondial, la société est active dans plus de 130 pays, détient en totalité 39 filiales et compte une base de production qui inclut des sites de production dans douze pays, dont l’Allemagne, le Brésil, la Chine, l’Inde et l’Italie. Nous nous engageons à développer, produire, promouvoir et distribuer des solutions pour le chargement, le déchargement et le transport de marchandises.

La croissance et le succès d’Hyva reposent sur deux aspects essentiels de son fonctionnement : la qualité et la nature innovante des solutions de la société, ainsi que l’excellence de son assistance client. Le premier aspect, la qualité des produits, est illustrée par le fait qu’Hyva offre aujourd’hui le vérin frontal télescopique hydraulique le plus robuste au monde, ainsi qu’une gamme complète de vérins à double effet, de grues roulantes montées sur camion ou fixes, de systèmes de levage de conteneurs (bras et portiques de manutention) et d’unités de collecte de déchets. Ces solutions sont utilisées dans le monde entier dans un grand nombre de secteurs tels que les transports, la construction, l’industrie minière, la manutention de matériaux et les fournisseurs de services environnementaux.

La qualité du service, elle aussi, fait partie intégrante de la philosophie d’entreprise d’Hyva : Active dans plus de 130 pays, la société gère l’un des plus vastes réseaux d’assistance client de l’industrie au monde. C’est grâce à ce réseau qu’Hyva a acquis une réputation internationale en matière d’excellence de l’assistance client.

We must be doing alright as they say that imitation is the most sincere form of flattery and whenever we come up with a new design it is not long before our competition start to copy it.

Here at King Bars we are aiming at being the best not the biggest.

Name: VIVA
Description:
Mechanical fluids are a danger for mechanics and the environment. VIVA's mission is to protect them!

Viva was created after realising that oil change practices in workshops were often cumbersome and tedious, and did not respect either the environment or the recommendations of health bodies.

It had become imperative to develop new practices and technical solutions to make fluid handling quick, clean and safe, and in line with environmental and quality of life issues in the workplace.

For more than 20 years, VIVA has been manufacturing intelligent closures and high-performance draining, dispensing and sampling solutions. Already adopted by more than 100 customers (RATP, Keolis, Sytral, Air France, Scania, Iveco, SDIS, etc.), VIVA equipment enables workshops to gain in productivity, practicality, durability and quality. 

A real ally for QHSE managers, VIVA also meets the challenges of health and safety in the workplace by preventing mechanics from coming into contact with or inhaling fluids. Our solutions also help to protect the environment by making fluid transfers safer.

Name: LATTICE International AS
Description:
LATTICE is committed to changing the way the global maritime industry can adopt and transport new energy carriers. Its primary focus is serving the global maritime sector with flexible, large-scale, space- and cost-effective containment solutions for cargo freight and ship fuel systems. LATTICE Pressure Vessels (LPV) are free-shape, pressurized tanks tailored to several key application areas, including storing cryogenic fluids such as LNG (liquid natural gas), LNH3 (liquid ammonia), LCO2 (liquid carbon dioxide) and LH2 (liquid hydrogen) at scale. Conventional storage types and tank solutions in the market all entail some form of limitation, if not very real drawbacks related to use of materials, pressure-loading, space inefficiency, design and scalability constraints, or cumbersome fabrication methods or long lead times. 

The LPV overcomes or solves major problems affecting maritime transport by providing solutions that 1) Ensures most optimal utilization of ship infrastructure and real-estate for storing and transporting fluids/fuels, 2) Grants full flexibility in tank and ship design for fitting system into ship, 3) Accommodates higher pressure-loading capabilities and safety requirements, and 4) Enables unlimited scalability, no matter the size, pressure, or shape.

The unique benefits, value additions and advantages of the LPV technology are increasingly apparent and recognized by leading maritime industry players. Whether enabling large-scale storage and transportation of LCO2 throughout the CCUS value chain or materializing the least cargo-disruptive storage solution for accommodating onboard carbon capture & storage (OCCS) inside vessels where space is premium, LATTICE is unlocking new substantial values for its clients.

LATTICE is located both in Norway and Korea, deriving and combining the latest scientific knowledge and best industry practice from both the Norwegian and Korean maritime world. The company is headquartered at Lysaker, just outside Oslo.

Name: PHOENICE
Description:
PHOENICE aims at developing a C SUV-class plug-in hybrid (P1/P4) vehicle demonstrator whose fuel consumption and pollutant emissions will be jointly minimized for real world driving conditions. This development will require the optimisation of a highly efficient gasoline engine, relying on a dual dilution combustion approach with excess air and EGR, synergizing an innovative in-cylinder charge motion with high pressure injection, novel ignition technologies, and an electrified turbocharger particularly relevant for hybrid architectures. The potential of alternative fuels produced by P2X processes will also be considered. To achieve the targeted near-zero emissions in transient conditions specific to PHEV in real driving conditions, the demonstrator vehicle will be equipped with a complete and dedicated after-treatment system including an electrically heated catalyst, a SCR and a GPF for abating NOx, particle number down to 10 nm, and non-regulated gaseous emissions. 
The vehicle overall efficiency will be increased with an exhaust waste heat recovery system for generating an additional electric power contribution for cabin heating or cooling, or for reducing the switch-on time of the internal combustion engine in cold conditions, thereby limiting the engine-out pollutant emissions such as particles. Virtual methods will be employed to reduce the calibration time of all the vehicle sub-systems. The vehicle control will use all the flexibility of the hybrid architecture and sub-systems to lower in real time the driving emissions and fuel consumption.
Technologies developed in PHOENICE will achieve a TRL 7 paying a specific attention to cost, industrialization, and to the use opportunity for various vehicle classes so as to maximize the economic and environmental impacts.

This project has received funding from the European Union’s Horizon 2020 research and innovation programme under Grant Agreement No. 101006841

5-8 semaines de livraison garanties | Zéro discrimination entre partenaires | Zéro commande minimum | Marges justes et stables

Pourquoi nous devrions travailler ensemble :

Name: Velorbis
Description:
“Ride in Style” -Velorbis was born from the hunt for a top-quality classic style urban bicycle with a stylish and iconic design aesthetic that reflected the elements of world-renowned Danish design, and cool Copenhagen cycling culture. The founders of the company Christian Linde & Kenneth Bødiker couldn’t find what they were looking for in the bicycle industry so they decided to design their own urban commuter. Today Velorbis continues to improve its design of classic style urban bicycles and other lifestyle products after studying stylish male and female Copenhagen cyclists for a number of years, listening to their issues and needs. Velorbis supports global urban sustainability and green transportation initiatives and its aim is to encourage as many people as possible to adopt a stylish two-wheeled approach.

OUR NAME – The word VELORBIS is a Registered Trademark under EU, US and Chinese law and is composed from the words “VELO” which means “Bicycle” in several European languages and the word “ORBIS” which is the word for “Rotation or Motion” in Latin. A simple fact to remember; when pronouncing our name just place the emphasis on the “O”!

OUR LION CREST – It is the same with our Velorbis lion crest logo as it is with our bicycles – we have a passion for excellence – reflected in everything that we do. The crest incorporates significant details. The 2 lions symbolise the two founders of Velorbis, who both have Leo as their star signs. The Crown symbolises the fact that the founders both originate from the Kingdoms of Denmark and Sweden.

At Velorbis we wish to be majestic in everything we do and as such, we have designed our bicycles to be ultra posture-friendly with a relaxed riding position to give a majestic vantage point from which to monitor the traffic and view the surroundings.

We believe it when we say; Velorbis – Ride in Style.

Name: Pomona Road Truck Sales
Description:
In 2006, a legacy was born in the heart of Kempton Park… Pomona Road Truck Sales. Now, although the company might be relatively new, the passion and expertise fueling our enterprise date back to the 1970s.
The company as it is today, originated from a sequence of events. The company started out as a family-owned transport company and as all things go, we needed repairs done fast to ensure a smooth business flow. Our newfound in-house repair service spun our company into new ventures including establishing a manufacturing and repair service and spares department. Thus creating a one-stop-shop for all our customers' needs.

With renewed focus, our transport company was transformed into an all-encompassing customer service hub where truck and trailer sales became our fascination and passion. A win–win relationship for all.

Where We Are Now:
What started as a transport company has grown into a one-stop shop for various industries. As the needs of our customers changed, Pomona Road Truck Sales evolved into the PR Group of Companies with specialised services and divisions to cater for all our customers’ needs.

What We Offer:
We expertly buy and sell used trucks, trailers and plant equipment, nationally or internationally. Exportation processes are included in the service we render. We also extensively design and manufacture stepdecks and lowbeds and repair any brand of truck or trailer.

Here’s an extensive list of our offerings:
- Buying and selling of used trucks
- Supplying spares and parts for trucks
- Buying and selling of used truck trailers
- Repairing of used truck trailers
- Supplying spares and parts for truck trailers
- Buying and selling of plant equipment
- Repairing of plant equipment
- Supplying spares and parts for plant equipment
- Truck, trailer and plant auctions

Name: Elektra - SAFETY IN EVERY DIMENSION
Description:
About Elektra

Our journey began in 2015, focusing on designing, manufacturing, and selling automatic door control systems for the Indian bus industry. Initially, we catered to the aftermarket, and over time, expanded our reach to Original Equipment Manufacturers (OEMs). Today, Elektra stands as a hub of innovation, offering a diverse range of cutting-edge solutions, including:

*Automatic Door Control Systems for Buses:*

Electric door control systems - for Hydraulic brake buses 
Electro-Pneumatic door control systems
Jack Knife / Bi-Fold doors
single and Double Inswing doors 
single and Double Outswing  doors

*Automatic Wheelchair Lifts for Buses, Trains, Ambulances, and Special Vehicles:*

Two-in-one Step Type Wheelchair lift
UVL Wheelchair lift
Double Arm Wheelchair lift
Automatic power ramp
Manual wheelchair ramp

At Elektra, we take pride in being one of the first to develop both automatic electric door control systems and wheelchair lifts for buses. Our products are not only cost-effective and durable, but they have also been benchmarked against the best in the industry.

Safety remains our top priority. We’ve met and exceeded the rigorous safety and performance standards set by esteemed institutions like 

ARAI - Automotive research association of India
ICAT - International center for automotive technology

*Our Mission*

At Elektra, our mission is to revolutionize public transportation by providing innovative, safe, and inclusive mobility solutions. We are committed to making transportation systems more accessible for everyone, while maintaining the highest standards of safety, reliability, and performance. Through our continuous pursuit of innovation, we aim to set new benchmarks in the industry and contribute to a future where public transport is both efficient and accessible for all.

Name: AKA-DanBox A/S

Vi udvikler og producerer optimale boks-, tank-, og afdækningsløsninger til et utal af anvendelsesområder og brancher som:
	Lastbil
	Specialkøretøj
	Varevogne
	Landbrug & entreprenør
	Trailer - fra blokvogn til hobbytrailer
	m.fl.

Alle områder og brancher, der har behov for at udnytte pladsen optimalt, kan skabe værdi gennem vores omfattende kompetence til at opbygge individuelt formede opbevaringsbokse, tanke til væsker, afdækning, m.m.

Udover vores produktion af standardprodukter har vi specialiseret os i at udvikle og fremstille individuelt kundetilpassede løsninger til vores kunder.
Herved kan vi helt optimalt udnytte den sparsomme plads, således at vores kunder kan medbringe det ønskede udstyr samt brændstof eller væsker som vand, hydraulikolie, m.v.

Alle produkter er fremstillet i den højeste kvalitet i vores egen produktion. Vi afsætter vores produkter over det meste af Europa gennem vores egen salgsorganisation eller gennem distributører.

Vi er blandt de fortrukne leverandører indenfor boks-, tank- og afdækningsløsninger til lastbiler, varebiler, trailere, specialkøretøjer, landbrugsmaskiner m.fl. - både standard og skræddersyede bokse og tanke bl.a. vores kendte varemærker DanBox og AKA, som er særdeles populære.

De førende producenter af lastbil og specialkøretøjer anvender disse bokse og tanke, idet vores fleksible design medfører, at pladsen udnyttes optimalt samt giver de bedste arbejdsbetingelser for chaufføren.

Til varevogne er vi kendte for at levere en komplet løsning med boks og tank.
Vi tilbyder også til entreprenør- og landbrugsbranchen specialkonstruerede opbevaringsløsninger og forskellige tilpassede tanke (vand, hydraulikolie, brændstof o.l.)

Vores produkter er kendetegnet ved høj kvalitet, godt håndværk samt fokus på lovgivningsmæssige forhold.

Description:
Pionnier de la mobilité depuis 1902, les cycles LABOR reviennent en 2024 sur un marché émergent : celui des speed bikes (aussi appelé Speed-Pedelec ou S-Pedelec).

Un speed bike c’est un vélo proposant une assistance électrique jusqu’à 45km/h, soit près de deux fois plus rapide qu’un VAE (Vélo à Assistance Électrique). Souvent plus rapide qu’une voiture en environnement périurbain, bien plus léger et silencieux qu’un cyclomoteur ou motocyclette thermique, le speed bike est le moyen de mobilité motorisé le plus écologique puisqu’il offre le plus faible taux de rejet eqCO2 sur une analyse complète de cycle de vie.

Fabriqués à la main en France, disposant notamment d’un châssis en fibre de carbone, les LABOR sont des speed bikes haut de gamme. Performants grâce à leur conception issue du monde de la compétition, ils utilisent les meilleurs matériaux et les meilleurs composants existants pour offrir une expérience de conduite exceptionnelle. 
Grâce à la maitrise complète de la fabrication en interne, ils sont aussi hautement customisables afin de répondre aux attentes des clients les plus exigeants.

PLUS D'INFO A VENIR.

Name: IrisKey.ai
Description:
IrisKey.ai is developing a patent-pending control layer for next-generation transport systems, focused on one critical problem: secure handover and enablement.

As vehicles become more connected, automated, and shared, the biggest risk is no longer performance — it’s who is authorised and fit to take control at the exact moment a system is enabled.

IrisKey.ai addresses this gap by combining biometric identity verification, AI-based fitness-to-operate indicators, and an enforceable enable/immobilise gate, producing a verifiable audit trail for operators, OEMs, insurers, and regulators.

Designed as a licensable integration, the system is intended to reduce OEM build stress, liability exposure, and compliance risk across applications including VLR, automotive, fleet, rail, maritime, and aviation environments.

Validation is being progressed through industry and academic collaboration, with a focus on real-world deployment readiness rather than hype.

The objective is simple: prevent unsafe or unauthorised operation before it happens, not investigate it afterwards.

1978 yılında küçük bir atölye olarak; vinçler ve kaldırma makineler için parça imalatına Konya'da başlamıştır. Geçen zaman ile birlikte gelişmesini sürdürerek, vinç ekipmanları üretimine geçmiş ve bugünkü yapısının ilk temelleri o tarihte atılmıştır.

1988 yılında Konya'da ki fabrika binasına geçişi ile birlikte faaliyet konusunu genişleterek öncelikle vinçlerin ve kaldırma makinelerinin komple olarak üretimine başlamış, projelendirme ve diğer dizaynlar konusunda çalışmalarına yoğunlaşarak kendisini geliştirmiştir.

1992 yılında ise Mısır, Filistin, Lübnan, Ürdün gibi Ortadoğu ülkelerinden Cezayir, Kuveyt, Nijerya, Suudi Arabistan gibi Afrika ve Arap ülkelerinden Bulgaristan, Yunanistan gibi Avrupa ülkelerini çok geniş bir yelpazeye ihracata başlamıştır.

1996 yılında alınan ararlar çerçevesinde firmanın 2000'li yıllara gerek üretim hacmi ve kalitesi gerekse kurumsal yapısı ile hazırlıklı ve sağlıklı girebilmesi amacı ile yatırım ve gelişim programı uygulamaya sokulmuş olunup bu bağlamda ISO çalışmalarına da start verilmiştir.

2002 yılında ise bugün halen faaliyetini devam ettirmekte bulunduğu Konya Karatay'da ki fabrikasına taşınmış olup hem üretim hacmini genişletmiş hem de üretim çeşitliliğini artırmıştır.

2006 yılında ise daha önce kazanmış olduğu marka tescil hakkını yeni logosu ve yeni üretim alanında tekrar elde etmiş olup kurumsallık adına önemli bir adım atmıştır.

2011 yılında ise Yüksan içerisinde koymuş bulunduğu hedeflere ulaşmak ve tüm çalışanları ile birlikte kurumsallaşma ve gelişimini sürdürerek önümüzde ki yıllarda müşterilerine çok daha iyi hizmet verebilme azmi ve gayretindedir.

Name: DUX
Description:
Dux is a solution to help fleet safety management spot red flags in driver's behavior. Management can use the insights and recommendations from Dux to take remedial steps before an actual collision occurs - reducing losses and saving lives.
We take privacy seriously and understand the risks of distractions in the driver’s environment. Dux does not use intrusive cameras or microphones in the vehicle. Driver behavior is monitored without distracting sounds or lights.
DuxBox is a small, simple device that collects physical vehicle movement data. It measures swerving, acceleration, braking, and other events that relate to driving safety. DuxApp then analyzes this data in the context of intersection maps, historical crash data overlaid on weather, and other relevant data sets to accurately assess driver's behavior.

Fleet safety management and driver trainers can see how drivers in their fleet score on safe driving behavior and trends across the fleet and the routes driven. DuxApp promotes a constructive ongoing dialog between trainers and drivers as to "what happened", discussing near-collision situations that are flagged on the route map.
At the organizational level, Dux can help the fleet management team make decisions on route planning, and driver rostering to optimize cost while maximizing fleet efficiency and safety.

Dux operation is cost-effective. There are no ongoing mobile data charges to use the solution. DuxBox stores the real-time data locally and automatically uploads it to the cloud whenever Wi-Fi connectivity is available, such as when the vehicle returns to the garage. Based on the collected driving data, Drive Square Simulation can recommend specific driver training scenarios for the driver.

Name: Fontaine Fifth Wheel - LATAM
Description:
Fontaine Fifth Wheel es el fabricante de quintas ruedas más grande del mundo y el innovador del único sistema de cierre autoajustable en la industria: el Fontaine No-Slack. Con plantas de producción certificadas bajo ISO/TS 16949:2009 en todo el mundo, la empresa divide su organización global en dos grupos operativos: America y Europa.

Fontaine Fifth Wheel Norteamérica tiene su sede principal  en Jasper, Alabama , donde además de las oficinas corporativas,  alberga el centro de investigación y desarrollo más grande del mundo enfocado exclusivamente en tecnología de acoplamiento de quintas ruedas. Allí, los ingenieros perfeccionan las líneas de productos existentes mientras imaginan, diseñan y hacen prototipos para las quintas ruedas del futuro.

Las soluciones que ofrecemos se desarrollan con un enfoque absoluto en el cliente y se adaptan para satisfacer los requisitos específicos de una amplia gama de aplicaciones, desde estándar hasta de trabajo severo. Las quintas ruedas fijas, deslizables y bloqueadas que entregamos cuentan con el avanzado sistema No-Slack de ajuste automático. Esto es importante para nuestros clientes porque una de las principales causas de desgaste en las quintas ruedas es el juego entre el perno rey muela y cuña . Este juego transmite ondas de choque a través del chasis mientras el vehículo circula por las carreteras bajo carga. A su vez, esto causa un desgaste prematuro de los componentes e incluso fallas; y los constantes golpes resultan molestos e incómodos para los conductores.

La tecnología No-Slack de Fontaine resuelve este problema ajustando automáticamente el juego de la quinta rueda para lograr una conexión firme y segura que compensa el desgaste. Los clientes se benefician de esta tecnología avanzada que extiende la vida útil del producto mientras reduce el mantenimiento, brindando a los administradores de flotas un menor costo operativo por milla y a los conductores una experiencia de manejo más suave y cómoda.

Name: Track & Trail
Description:
Embrace the Ride: The Unseen Benefits of Track and Trail Biking for Professionals 

In today’s fast-paced world, finding a balance between professional demands and personal well-being is paramount. Track and trail biking emerges not just as a leisure activity but as a strategic asset for professionals across industries. Here’s why:

1. Enhancing Mental Clarity and Creativity: Navigating through winding trails and mastering tracks demands focus, quick decision-making, and adaptability. These rides serve as a metaphor for workplace challenges, where mental agility and creativity become crucial for overcoming obstacles and innovating under pressure.

2. Building Resilience and Determination: The unpredictable nature of outdoor biking—be it tackling steep inclines or enduring long distances—mirrors the resilience needed in our professional lives. It teaches us to push beyond our limits, embrace discomfort, and recover from setbacks with renewed strength.

3. Promoting Physical Health and Endurance: Regular engagement in track and trail biking boosts cardiovascular health, improves stamina, and reduces stress levels. A healthier body hosts a more productive mind, leading to enhanced performance and efficiency at work.

4. Encouraging Teamwork and Leadership: Group rides foster a sense of community, teamwork, and leadership. They highlight the importance of communication, trust, and support among peers, directly translating to a more cohesive and collaborative workplace environment.

5. Providing Networking Opportunities: The biking community is diverse, including professionals from various sectors. Rides and biking events offer unique networking platforms, opening doors to new business opportunities, collaborations, and friendships.

Volbleregt Aanhangwagens BV streeft ernaar om klanttevredenheid op de eerste plaats te zetten. Het bedrijf werkt nauw samen met klanten om ervoor te zorgen hun dat speckeifie eisen en wensen worden vervuld. Met een team van ervaren professionals zorgt Vollebregt Aanhangwagens BV voor een uitstekende service en ondersteuning gedurende het hele proces, van het advies bij het kiezen van een aanhangwagen tot de after-sales service.

Kortom, Vollebregt Aanhangwagens BV is een gerenommeerd bedrijf dat hoogwaardige aanhangwagens levert. Met aandacht voor kwaliteit, service en klanttevredenheid is Vollebregt Aanhangwagens BV een betrouwbare partner voor al uw aanhangwagenbehoeften.

Name: REVOLOK USA
Description:
REVOLOK USA is a professional transportation equipment manufacturer for the heavy and specialized cargo transportation industry. Our mission is to provide smarter, safer, faster, and easier flatbed load securement for those who do it… With real-time data for those who care. 

Revolutionize your cargo securement today with the all-new REVOLOK 6600 drill-powered load binder. With impressive speed and efficiency, this innovative tool will make chain securement a breeze. The REVOLOK 6600 can be easily and effortlessly used with a drill and mini torque multiplier to bring 3/8" grade 70 chain under tension. It also has a radial clutch, which allows for the accurate securement of cargo. This reduces securement time and eliminates the need for guesswork, ensuring that cargo is securely tied down every time.

The REVOLOK 6600 is the best alternative to ratchet chain binders among flatbed trucking companies using 3/8 G70 chain tie-downs. It offers many advantages, such as increased driver satisfaction, improved recruitment & retention, increased productivity, and higher earning potential. Using this drill-powered binder can also reduce loading and unloading time by up to 70%, load check time, worker’s compensation costs, new driver cargo securement training, equipment damage, and transportation fines.

In addition to its impressive features and benefits, the REVOLOK 6600 is also proudly made in the USA. It has a 4:1 design factor of 6600lbs WLL (working load limit) & 24,600lbs MBS (minimum break strength). With all of these benefits, it’s no wonder that the REVOLOK 6600 is quickly becoming the go-to tool for flatbed load & cargo securement professionals in the heavy and specialized cargo transportation market.

Name: EOS-ENVIRO 40ft ISO Container Handling Units Series ContiLift CHU-40
Description:
Discover the enormous advantages of the self-loading / unloading  40ft ISO Container Handling Units ContiLift Series CHU-40 - developed for the trouble-free handling of 40ft and 45ft ISO Containers ST & HC with a max. weight of 35 tons ! Full or empty containers can be loaded independently and quickly from the rear side within approx. 2 minutes - without the necessity to wait for reach stackers, forklifts etc. 

Our original Contilift CHU-40 is suitable for a wide range of commercial and military utilizations. Highly recommend for container haulage companies and military logistics corps, the ContiLift CHU-40 can be deployed not only for the handling of 40ft ISO Containers but also of 10ft, 20ft, 30ft and 45ft ISO Containers.

The sturdy lift arm - installed on a sliding cart - enables a lifting of 40ft ISO Containers with a loading angle of 8°. Therefore, goods inside containers remain safely at their place without sliding backwards. Optionally, the 40ft ISO Container Handling Unit ContiLift CHU-40 can be equipped with a tilting cylinder to dump bulk goods with an angle of 45°.

Name: Boomarine
Description:
Supplying marine equipment such as marine fenders, marine anchors, marine buoys, and marine chairs and providing related integrated solutions for projects is the main business of Boomarine. Our main jobs include:
1. Technical support: Before sales, Boomarine will provide an integrated solution for the whole equipment system; Our engineers will finish the design and calculation at this stage.
2. Manufacturing: Quality control is started from the raw material to delivery, we must make sure the products are perfectly presented to our clients. Each kind of product has its individual inspection and testing standards, we could offer any third-party inspection report, or classification society certification such as ABS, BV, GL, DNV, LR, etc.
3. Shipping: we will deliver the cargo and perfectly present it to our clients.
4. After-sales Services: QA report, on-site installation, commissioning &testing will be provided.

Name: Boseco Energy
Description:
We address the critical challenge of fast charging station availability for electric vehicles. With the EV market rapidly expanding, the need for an efficient and accessible charging infrastructure is more evident than ever. Our mobile charging solution is designed to bridge this gap by offering fast charging stations that can be installed quickly in high-demand locations, even without existing infrastructure.

Our system comprises mobile fast charging stations with user-friendly features, an electric truck for station maintenance, and user-convenient app services. We endeavor to enhance the accessibility and efficiency of electric vehicle charging, reducing the waiting time to just 30 minutes.

Backed by a team with diverse expertise in engineering, manufacturing, marketing, and customer relations, we are committed to delivering a high-quality and user-friendly solution for the growing electric vehicle market. Our vision is to make electric vehicle charging an integral part of everyday life, helping to drive the future of sustainable transportation.

Name: VEPOD Ltd

We are constantly exploring new technologies and methodologies to enhance the performance and functionality of our conveyor systems, ensuring that our customers stay ahead of the curve in their respective industries.

Nuestra empresa está totalmente orientada a nuestros clientes y nos enfocamos en satisfacer sus necesidades. Nuestro esfuerzo está orientado a ofrecer una proposición de valor sólida a nuestros clientes – la mejor calidad, al mejor precio.

Name: Gel Dynamics, Inc.
Description:
Few developments in history have the opportunity to shift a paradigm forever. Yet, armed with a patented technology twenty years in development, Gel Dynamics is on the brink of changing wheel balancing forever.  An ongoing and costly challenge for the transportation industry, wheel balancing has not seen any meaningful innovation or advance since the advent of weight-based balancing 100 years ago. 

Finally, this is going to change. We have the solution, and we’re building the business that will offer the transportation industry an innovative and remarkably simple solution that will save the trucking industry millions in fuel, tire, and labor costs while greatly contributing to reducing greenhouse gases. A win-win for the industry and the planet.

We are in the early stages of building the business and are excited to ramp up activities in 2023. Follow us for updates on our progress. For interested investors, please reach out to CEO Roger Carnehammar at roger@geldynamics.com.

Name: Hanoi Elevator and Electrical Equipment Joint Stock Company
Description:
Thành lập năm 2012, trong hành trình hơn 10 năm phát triển, chúng tôi luôn luôn đặt chất lượng sản phẩm và trải nghiệm khách hàng lên hàng đầu. Tôn chỉ của chúng tôi là: “ Sự hài lòng của khách hàng là niềm tự hào của chúng tôi”. Vì vậy, Công ty chúng tôi luôn giành được sự tin tưởng tuyệt đối từ các đối tác lớn và khách hàng trong và ngoài nước.
Khởi đầu từ sự sáng tạo của những kỹ sư tự động hóa người Việt.  Nhờ chiến lược kinh doanh sáng suốt của Ban Giám Đốc và sự nỗ lực không ngừng của toàn thể với đội ngũ nhân viên. Với quy trình quản lý và triển khai khoa học, chuyên nghiệp…  HNEE đã đầu tư đào tạo nhân sự một cách bài bản, mời chuyên gia các hãng thang máy hàng đầu thế giới như Mitsubishi, Schindler, Kohler, Matiz … tư vấn  kỹ thuật thực tế tại Việt Nam hoặc cử đi học nước ngoài đều đặn. Chính vì thế đội ngũ nhân lực có chuyên môn cao, giàu kinh nghiệm, ham học hỏi khoa học kỹ thuật tiên tiến trên thế giới và áp dụng linh hoạt với các công trình phức tạp.

Established in 2012, in our journey of more than 10 years of development, we have always put product quality and customer experience first. Our principle is: "Customer satisfaction is our pride". Therefore, our company always wins absolute trust from major partners and customers at home and abroad.
Starting from the creativity of Vietnamese automation engineers. Thanks to the wise business strategy of the Board of Directors and the continuous efforts of the entire staff. With a scientific and professional management and implementation process... HNEE has invested in systematic personnel training, inviting experts from the world's leading elevator companies such as Mitsubishi, Schindler, Kohler, Matiz... to provide technical advice. practical training in Vietnam or regular study abroad. That's why our workforce is highly specialized, experienced, eager to learn advanced science and technology in the world and flexibly apply it to complex projects.

Name: Green and Circular
Description:
Green & Circular rend les véhicules accessibles, sans modifier leur châssis.

Nous concevons un plancher TPMR ultra-fin, avec rampe interne, intégrée et points d’arrimage préinstallés : une solution 3-en-1 prête à poser, pensée pour les constructeurs et carrossiers.

Notre solution brevetée est incontournable, elle permet l'aménagement TPMR rapide des véhicules en 5 heures, contre 2 mois  avec la technique traditionnelle qui consiste à décaisser le châssis des véhicules.
Conçue pour durer, notre solution est fabriquée dans le respect de l’environnement, en privilégiant des procédés à faible impact carbone.

Multimarques, l’ensemble est proposé en leasing, avec un véhicule adapté par nos partenaires, pour simplifier l’acquisition et accélérer l’inclusivité.

Name: SecVac SRL
Description:
SEC-VAC srl was established in 1985 as a technological development company, whose initial project was aimed at solving the problem of deterioration of electrical insulation in multi-pair telephone cables, due to the presence of water or humidity in them. The result of this work was the so-called RACT Method.
In 1987 it began its activity in the field of freight and passenger transportation with rational driving programs, today known as Efficient Driving.

Name: EOS-ENVIRO 20ft ISO Container Handling Units Series ContiLift ICAK-20
Description:
Implementing our vision of a customer-focused supplier of transport logistics equipment for commercial & military applications, we are very proud to introduce the modified EOS-ENVIRO 20ft ISO Hook Lift Units Series ContiLift ICAK-20-P (fixedly mounted version) & ContiLift ICAK-20-A (automatic version), which does not require any manual interoperation: All functions are driven pneumatically and controlled by a remote control in the driver's cab ! 

EOS-ENVIRO 20ft ISO Container Hook Lift Adapter Kits Series ContiLift ICAK-20 are suitable for the safe & easy handling of 20ft ISO Containers 1C & 1CC and fulfill the requirements acc. to STANAG 2413. They can be easily retrofitted to standard hook lift devices of all commonly used brands.

Name: Gulf Coast Filters Inc.
Description:
Gulf Coast Filters, Inc. (GCF)  serves a wide variety of customers from the independent owner-operator trucker to Ocean Alexander Yachts to the US Military M-1 Abrams Tanks. With a global reputation, GCF enjoys a market share of customers that ranges from the Gulf of Mexico to the Republic of the Philippines and beyond who are seeking the finest filtration products on the market.

Additionally, Gulf Coast Filters has spent thousands of hours monitoring oil analysis reports and helping customers achieve the maximum reliability and life of their engines, while maintaining a strong commitment to responsible environmental management.

Name: Smart Loading Solutions
Description:
Smart Loading Solutions is a pioneering venture brought to you by the innovative minds behind BAB Engineering — a company renowned for excellence in engineering smart loading solutions.

Born from the success of BAB Engineering’s Hydraulic Loading Deck, our new revolutionising container loading system (Patent Pending Application: 2025900749) is set to transform how bulky and difficult-to-handle equipment is loaded into shipping containers. At Smart Loading Solutions, we deliver cutting-edge, practical loading innovations designed to eliminate manual handling risks, reduce labour intensity, and streamline global freight processes.

With a strong foundation in engineering expertise and a passion for solving real-world loading challenges, Smart Loading Solutions is redefining the future of shipping container logistics.

Engineering the future of shipping container logistics

Name: Austar Lighting
Description:
Founded in 1998, Shanghai Austar Lighting Electrical Industry Co., Ltd. is a high-tech enterprise integrating scientific and technological development, production and manufacturing, product sales, engineering project design, traffic lighting engineering, construction, and installation. Located in the Zhoupu Wisdom Industrial Zone, Pudong New District, Shanghai, we have access to beautiful scenery and outstanding people. Since our establishment, we have pushed to the forefront of management and development and are determined to build Austar into a role model enterprise in the industry.

We are situated on a plot of 10,000 square metres, with over 12,000 square metres of research, production, and office space. At present, there are more than 80 employees, with 20% in management roles. Our main products are traffic signals, traffic support facilities, traffic guidance displays, signal control systems, smart traffic management systems, pedestrian crossing systems, and more. The company has an annual output of more than 20,000 LED traffic signal lights and more than 50,000 LED commercial lighting fixtures. Our traffic facility products and lighting fixtures are also exported to Australia, Europe, Southeast Asia, and the Middle East.

Description:

Realizamos serviços de fabricação, instalação, conservação, manutenção e modernização de elevadores. Contamos com tecnologia de ponta e mão de obra qualificada para realizar o seu projeto e superar as suas expectativas.

Name: EOS-ENVIRO 40ft Heavy Duty Hook Lift Series ContiLift HDHL
Description:
EOS-ENVIRO proudly introduce the ContiLift Heavy Duty Hook Lift Units Series HDHL-40, which have been developed for discerning customers demanding a robust device for very long, wide and / or heavy hook lift containers / bins and flatracks . By deploying these units, the transport volume & payload are significantly increased whilst loading cycles are reduced to 3 minutes. 

But, not only hook lift containers / bins are safely handled: Military and commercial flatracks, platforms and rigs with skid and hook eye are also carried in a cost-effective and time-saving way. Each unit is engineered & produced as an unique project. Therefore, you achieve a device, which is totally engineered & manufactured acc. to your specific demands.

Excellently suitable for applications not only for the recycling industry, waste management, demolition, building supplies and mining industry but also for military deployment, the extraordinary 40ft Heavy Duty Hook Lift Units ContiLift HDHL-40 with extreme payload will boost permanently your capacities !

Name: Caibor Manutenção e Automação Industrial
Description:
A Caibor é uma empresa capacitada e equipada nos âmbitos de tecnologia, qualidade de serviços,padrão de produção e setor de projetos.  Nosso forte é transformar idéias em equipamentos altamente produtivos e rentáveis.

 Trabalhamos com manutenção, automação e fabricação de equipamentos para a indústria da borracha e plásticos em geral.

Nossas instalações possuem uma oficina completa com um setor próprio de usinagem; ferramentas elétricas, hidráulicas, pneumáticas e todo aparato técnico para atender todas as necessidades de nossos clientes.

O setor de projeto está preparado para desenvolver equipamentos funcionais que acompanham os adventos tecnológicos de melhoria continua dos meios de produção.  Sempre procuramos inovar e melhorar nossa linha de produtos com a visão de sermos a melhor empresa fabricantes de guilhotinas hidráulicas, filtros manga, esteiras transportadoras e de corte, estufas entre outros produtos.

Nossos valores são o comprometimento, ética, qualidade de serviço, melhoria contínua e trabalho em equipe.

 

Caibor. Prontos para servir, inovar e criar.

Name: TetherTech Wheel Safety, Inc.
Description:
Any wheel separation event can be deadly, but tractor-trailer wheels are much heavier, and a tandem set of wheels has double the mass and is much more destructive.  The wheel off events are estimated to happen 100,000 times a year.  Our safety solution prevents wheel off events.  See also our YouTube channel, "Wheels On"

This presents a danger to both the motoring public, and other commercial carriers.

Tether Tech Wheel Safety devices prevent these separations, keeping the wheels tethered to the vehicle.

Name: HYVA BELGIUM - Kontich
Description:
Hyva is een van de oudste fabrikanten van oplossingen voor de transportsector en wordt sinds 1979 vertegenwoordigd in de Benelux. Sommigen kennen dit merk van autolaadkranen, anderen van de kipcilinders, haak- of portaalarmen. “Hyva is uitgegroeid tot een totaalleverancier voor horizontaal en verticaal transport”.

Opgericht in 1979 heeft Hyva zijn hoofdkantoor in Alphen aan den Rijn in Nederland. De Hyva-groep omvat 33 dochterondernemingen wereldwijd. Hyva België is één van de eerst opgerichte eigen vestigingen met een eigen werkplaats en servicediensten  gevestigd in Kontich (omgeving Antwerpen) en is ondertussen 40 jaar actief voor de regio België en Luxenburg. 

Hyva België bestaat uit een team van medewerkers die zich dagelijks inzetten voor de verkoop en service in België en Luxenburg van alle Hyva producten, meer specifiek alle hydraulische componenten voor kipperinstallaties, telescoopcilinders, haakarmsystemen en autolaadkranen.
Naast bovenstaande activiteiten bieden we een breed gamma aan Truck & Trailer accessoires aan, zoals gereedschapskisten, spatschermen en andere toebehoren.

Klanten kunnen bij Hyva Belgium terecht voor de verkoop van machines of onderdelen, maar ook voor de volledige opbouw van een nieuw voertuig. Samen met onze dealers en verschillende truckleveranciers verzorgen wij de totaaloplossing die u nodig heeft, volledig op maat uitgewerkt op elke specifieke toepassing.

Name: berkel-trailer
Description:
berkel-trailer – Aus Liebe zum Radfahren. Aus Überzeugung für Nachhaltigkeit.

Manchmal entstehen die besten Ideen direkt vor der eigenen Haustür – oder besser gesagt: am Flussufer.
Berkel-Trailer ist eine junge Manufaktur aus dem Münsterland, die mit Herzblut, Handwerk und Hingabe Fahrradanhänger baut. Unsere Produkte sind keine Massenware, sondern durchdachte Begleiter für den Alltag – gefertigt aus hochwertigen Materialien, mit Liebe zum Detail und dem Anspruch, wirklich nachhaltig zu sein.

Unsere Mission:
Mobilität neu denken – praktisch, flexibel und umweltbewusst.
Ob Einkauf, Ausflug, Hundetransport oder täglicher Arbeitsweg: Unsere Fahrradanhänger passen sich deinem Leben an – nicht umgekehrt.

Warum eine Manufaktur?
Weil wir jeden Anhänger nicht nur montieren, sondern entwickeln, testen, verbessern. Weil uns Qualität wichtiger ist als Geschwindigkeit. Und weil wir finden, dass echte Nachhaltigkeit nicht nur beim Material anfängt, sondern auch bei der Möglichkeit, jedes Teil nach Jahren noch nachzubestellen.

Und der Name?
„Trailer“ erklärt sich von selbst.
„Berkel“ ist der kleine Fluss, der durch unsere Heimatstadt Vreden fließt – und der für uns zum Symbol geworden ist: Für Natur, für Bewegung, für neue Wege.

Unsere Einladung an dich:
Lass das Auto öfter stehen.
Hol dir ein Stück neue Freiheit.
Und werde Teil einer Bewegung, die mit kleinen Schritten Großes verändert.

Wir freuen uns auf dich.
Dein Berkel-Trailer Team
