Name: CORE PRO
Description:
CORE PRO trailers are the smartest and most advanced on the market.  Modern construction methods incorporating INTELLI-CORE composite panels and assembly via structural adhesives improve how to build a trailer that will last for the long haul. This is a product of innovation and engineering paired with an understanding that the consumer requires a product that can be trusted and depended on for years. 

LIGHTWEIGHT & WATERPROOF

CORE PRO trailers are constructed from INTELLI-CORE Structural Composite Panels that incorporate closed-cell and water-resistant materials at their core.  These are then sandwiched between two layers of fiberglass creating a waterproof and extremely lightweight structure.  All in, CORE PRO units are far lighter than the competition, and will not rot, mildew, or decay.

INSULATION

INTELLI-CORE Structural Composite Panels used for the floor, walls, and roof are bonded together at their cores to create a completely sealed and insulated system.  The structural strength of the panels allows for a stud-less design significantly reducing thermal loss in the walls and ceiling.  R-9 walls, an R-11 floor, and an R-15 ceiling keep you warm when it is cool, and cool when it is hot.

DURABILITY & STRENGTH

The INTELLI-CORE Structural Composite Panel harnesses the efficiency of the I-beam concept to create a high-strength and low-weight structure.  Combining the strength of the panel with structural adhesives produces a trailer that is bonded together to form one resilient vehicular body.  This results in a more durable structure compared to conventional methods which rely on nails, staples, screws, and poor welds.

Name: mts stacking systems North America
Description:
mts stacking systems is developing and prodcing stacking columns (Klinken towers), line feeding systems and lithium-ion battery racks for automated production and buffer storage. 

Our solutions are designed for automotive components, battery components as well as complete lithium-ion batteries for electric vehicles. We are pioneers in the development of stacking columns for the separation and safe transport of 3D components that fit seamlessly into the automated production lines of the automotive industry, thanks to our products:

➤ Automation stacking towers
➤ Racks 
➤ drawer carts and turntables
➤ high voltage battery supply chain solutions
➤ Solution for critical lithium-ion Batteries

Our fully automatic operable load carriers make it possible to achieve high packing density. This allows manufacturers to store and transport more parts in the same space, which contributes to significantly lower transport costs and a considerable reduction in CO2 emissions. mts Maschinenbau GmbH is your reliable partner and is there for you worldwide, with production sites in Germany, Poland and the USA.

Name: Enhancing Automated Valet Parking (EAVP)

It seeks to unlock the full potential of Automated Valet Parking in Europe, leading the consistent and stepwise deployment of AVP functionality:
 1. Facilitating and supporting the implementation of priority actions in the deployment of AVP in Europe

Name: Schmitz Cargobull Baltic UAB
Description: Schmitz Cargobull is the leading manufacturer of semi-trailers for temperature-controlled freight, general cargo and bulk goods in Europe and a pioneer in digital solutions for trailer services and improved connectivity. The company also manufactures transport refrigeration machines for refrigerated semi-trailers for temperature-controlled freight transport. With a comprehensive range of services from financing, spare parts supply, service contracts and telematics solutions to used vehicle trading, Schmitz Cargobull supports its customers in optimising their total cost of ownership (TCO) and digital transformation. Schmitz Cargobull was founded in 1892 in Münsterland, Germany. The family-run company produces around 60,000 vehicles per year with over 6,000 employees and generated a turnover of around 2.4 billion euros in the 2023/24 financial year. The international production network currently comprises ten plants in Germany, Lithuania, Spain, England, Turkey, Slovakia and Australia.

Name: Tap Load
Description:
For a variety of reasons, such as theft, the weight of the cargo may be reduced along the way. This makes transportation management difficult, also due to the lack of proper loading, the weight of the load is not properly distributed in the loading place and the torque is created during the movement and the control of the vehicle becomes difficult or dangerous.

To solve all these problems, our solution is a device that monitors the weight of the load from the moment of loading to the time of unloading and provides a full report based on the time periods.

Name: MODES | a business division of European Van Service GmbH
Description:
Unser Geschäftsbereich MODES reagiert auf die Zeichen der Zeit und schafft Lösungen im Bereich der neuen urbanen Mikromobilität.
Als Mobilitäts-Unternehmen (zertifiziert nach DIN EN 9001:2015 und DIN EN ISO 14001:2015) sind wir uns der Verantwortung gegenüber der nachkommenden Generationen und unserem Planeten sehr bewusst.
Mit MODES bieten wir unseren Kunden im Bereich der Mobilität die Möglichkeit den ökologischen Fußabdruck so gering wie möglich zu halten. Das spiegelt sich nicht nur im Prozess unserer Fahrzeugumrüstungen oder der Umweltzertifizierung (ISO 14001) wieder – wir gehen auch neue Wege.

Die Mobilität ändert sich – die Innenstädte werden in Zukunft weiter für Fußgänger (m/w/d) und Radfahrerende optimiert. Große Fahrzeuge wie Autos und Transporter können in absehbarer Zeit nicht mehr in die Innenstädte und Fußgängerzonen fahren. Güter wie Pakete und Waren müssen aber weiterhin in die Läden und Geschäfte und online erworbene Paketpost zum Kunden geliefert werden.
Wir bieten einen überregionalen und markenunabhängigen Service für die Wartung, Reparatur, den Umbau und die Instandsetzung im Bereich der Mikromobilität und urbanen Logistik an. Wir verpflichten uns dabei den Fußabdruck zu minimieren und schaffen damit eine grünere und emissionsfreie Mobilität im innerstädtischen urbanen Bereich.
Die Stadt der Zukunft ist sauber, smart, sicher, lebenswert, ruhig und grün.

Name: Henan Peisa Machinery Co.,Ltd
Description:

What We Do
At PEISA Machinery, we focus on delivering safe, efficient, and intelligent transport solutions for heavy and oversized materials. Our main product range includes:

Battery-powered transfer carts

Rail transfer carts (low-voltage track powered)

Trackless electric flat carts

Hydraulic lifting transfer carts

Turntables and rail systems

Custom-built material handling vehicles (1–500 tons load capacity)

Every product is engineered with precision, built from high-strength steel, and designed for long-term operation in complex working environments.

Why Choose PEISA?
Customization Expertise: We understand that every customer has different needs. From cart size and structure to control system and automation level, our team offers tailor-made solutions.

In-house Manufacturing: With our own factory and professional R&D team, we ensure strict quality control and competitive pricing.

Global Service: PEISA’s equipment is exported to over 40 countries worldwide. We provide timely technical support and after-sales service.

Mission & Vision
Our mission is to help factories and production lines move heavy loads more easily, safely, and intelligently. With innovation and reliability at our core, we strive to become a global leader in the field of industrial transport automation.

Name: Dynamic Group of Companies - Canada
Description:
Recognized leaders in the field of port infrastructure safety and sustainability. Our primary mission is to bolster the resilience of port infrastructures worldwide.

Our flagship solution, the Dynamic Protective Barrier (DPB), offers a groundbreaking approach to energy dissipation upon impact. This unique innovation enhances the safety of port infrastructure while simultaneously utilizing tidal and wave energy, promoting renewable energy harnessing.

DPB's utility extends beyond conventional port infrastructure protection. It stands as a symbol of our commitment to developing sustainable energy solutions that address the pressing need for environmental responsibility. Amid increasing global pressure to achieve carbon neutrality and sustainable practices, the DPB represents our proactive response to these challenges.

Founded by Matthew Czerniatewicz, our dedicated team, including co-founder Robert Michalak, Chief Mechanical Engineer Jaroslaw Roszyk, and Business Partner Jacek Olba, infuses our efforts with technical prowess and innovative thinking. We are driven by an entrepreneurial spirit and a passion for changing the industry landscape.

Our patented, award-winning technology finds applications across a wide range of sectors, including marinas, roadways, motorsports, and cargo trailer rigs, proving the versatility of our innovation.

Made in L.A. (Loire Atlantique ;) éco-conçu avec 70% de matériaux bio sourcés, 20% de matériaux issus de l’économie circulaire, nous travaillons avec des partenaires engagés et des structure de l’insertion par l’activité économique et du travail protégé.
A oui au fait moi c’est Anthony Bordron, Designer depuis plus de 20 ans, passionné par les copeaux et le vélo depuis que je suis tout petit. J’ai conçu ce kit pour transporter mes 2 enfants avec l’objectif d’avoir un « véhicule » le plus simple, économe et respectueux de l’environnement possible pour réduire au maximum l’utilisation de notre voiture. J’espère que tu prendras autant de plaisir à le chevaucher que j’en ai eu à le concevoir et le fabriquer.
Chez VLOTEK, on concilie écologie et pouvoir d’achat tout en prenant soin de ta tribu. Rejoins-nous pour une nouvelle expérience de mobilité responsable et ludique !  
A très vite 
Anthony pour VLOTEK

Name: APUS
Description:
Actualmente, la búsqueda de alternativas de transporte no contaminantes ha propiciado un aumento considerable en el uso de la bicicleta a nivel mundial. Al mismo tiempo, se ha observado que no se han optimizado al máximo todos los aspectos relacionados con esta dinámica, como la comunicación entre ciclistas, la seguridad en este transporte, entre otros.

Como respuesta a la necesidad de optimizar los productos que actualmente están a la venta, hemos desarrollado un dispositivo que apoya la comunicación de los ciclistas con su entorno.

APUS es un dispositivo tecnológico y compacto, que a través de datos recibidos, es capaz de reconocer los patrones de movimiento que realizará un ciclista. básicamente, cuando se quiere girar a la derecha el dispositivo reconozca e indique al entorno la acción a desarrollar a través de un sistema de iluminación automatizado.

El uso de APUS como herramienta de comunicación, reduce el riesgo de accidentes, buscando en amplios márgenes, la comodidad y seguridad de los ciclistas al utilizar este medio de transporte.

quand tu fais une virée à vélo et que tu veux calculer tes performances sportives, 
quand tu oublies de le charger la nuit et qu'à la fin de la journée il n'a plus de batterie, 
c'est dans ces moments, que ton smartphone a l'habitude de te lâcher.

We don’t just supply truck bodies—we deliver a complete, efficient system that removes complexity from traditional bodybuilding.

WIR PRODUZIERN INNOVATIVE LASTENANHÄNGER IN BERLIN, DIE LÖSUNG FÜR DEN WARENTRANSPORT MIT DEM FAHRRAD!

Die wichtigsten Alleinstellungsmerkmale des wuppdis sind die 300 kg Zuladung, die langlebigen Aluminiumfelgen sowie der universelle Schnellverschluss durch den der Anhänger in Sekunden an jedes Fahrrad ge- und entkoppelt werden kann.

I. Manufacturing & Production Services
These are the core functions related to the creation of the transport assets.

Design and Engineering:

Concept Development: Research, feasibility studies, and creation of new transport concepts (e.g., electric buses, advanced rail cars).

Custom Vehicle Design: Tailoring vehicle specifications (dimensions, capacity, powertrain, internal layout) to meet specific client operational needs and regulatory requirements.

Prototyping & Testing: Building and rigorously testing pre-production models to ensure performance, safety, and compliance.

Advanced Materials Consulting: Advising on and utilizing lightweight, durable, or specialized materials (e.g., carbon fiber, high-strength steel).

Manufacturing & Assembly:

Vehicle Production: Mass production or specialized, low-volume assembly of vehicles (e.g., trucks, trailers, buses, trains, aircraft components).

Component Manufacturing: In-house or subcontracted production of major sub-assemblies (e.g., chassis, bodies, engines/motors, bogies).

Quality Assurance (QA) and Control (QC): Implementing stringent checks at every stage, including non-destructive testing, stress testing, and final vehicle inspection.

Regulatory Compliance: Ensuring all vehicles and components meet national and international safety, emission, and operational standards (e.g., ISO, EPA, EU/DOT regulations).

II. Aftermarket & Support Services
Once the vehicle is sold, these services ensure its continued, reliable operation.

Maintenance and Repair (MRO):

Scheduled/Preventative Maintenance: Offering service plans based on manufacturer-recommended schedules (mileage/hours/time) to prevent major failures.

Corrective Repair: Diagnosing and fixing unexpected mechanical, electrical, or structural faults.

Field Service: Deploying expert technicians to client operational sites for on-location support and emergency repairs.

Accident Repair & Refurbishment: Restoring damaged vehicles and offering comprehensive refurb

Name: Solvaytech
Description:
Solvaytech is a deep-tech engineering company developing advanced solutions in electric mobility, railway digitalization, power electronics, and intelligent transportation systems. Our mission is to build the next generation of AI-enabled mobility and energy technologies that enhance safety, efficiency, and sustainability across modern transportation networks.

Under the CERYAN brand, Solvaytech designs electric micro-vehicles and subsystem technologies for urban mobility, including high-efficiency electric drive systems, Battery Management Systems (BMS), DC/DC converters, charging electronics, and embedded control platforms. These systems support new mobility models such as shared mobility, low-speed vehicle fleets, and compact urban logistics.

Solvaytech also develops cutting-edge digitalization technologies for the railway sector. Our solutions include digital twins for rolling stock and maintenance depots, AI-based predictive maintenance, sensor-based condition monitoring, wayside inspection analytics, and embedded electronics for on-board systems. We collaborate with maintenance workshops, industrial operators, universities, and innovation partners to improve reliability, reduce operational costs, and support decarbonization in rail transportation.

In addition, Solvaytech designs IoT-based sensing platforms for industrial and agricultural environments, enabling data-driven decision support and real-time operational optimization.

Our R&D activities are supported by TÜBİTAK. Solvaytech actively engages with European innovation programs, including EIT Urban Mobility, Horizon Europe, and emerging rail digitalization initiatives.

We are committed to advancing mobility and transportation technologies through engineering excellence, innovation and strong international collaboration.

Description:
Solomon Commercials - Coldchain Transport Solutions

Solomon Commercials is one of the UK’s leading manufacturers of refrigerated vehicle conversions, delivering high-performance temperature-controlled transport solutions to the food distribution, retail logistics, grocery delivery, cold chain, and pharmaceutical sectors.

Since 1976, we’ve specialised in building bespoke refrigerated rigid bodies onto truck and lorry chassis, including multi-drop delivery vehicles, home delivery vans, retail distribution trucks, trailers, and multi-temperature solutions. Our vehicles are built for reliability, fuel efficiency, and compliance with the highest standards in perishable goods transport.

Our insulated bodywork is ideal for transporting:

- Fresh and frozen food distribution
- Pharmaceuticals and medical samples
- Healthcare
- Retail grocery orders
- Specialist ingredients and chilled goods

We also offer panel van conversions and insulated box bodies to suit all operational demands, from last-mile delivery to long-haul cold chain logistics.

With Solomon Bodyguard, our nationwide support service, we deliver proactive refrigerated body maintenance, fleet repairs, vehicle refurbishments, and body swaps, all carried out by qualified engineers, on your site, to minimise downtime.

Whether you operate in frozen food logistics, fresh produce distribution, clinical cold chain, or e-commerce grocery delivery, Solomon provides tailored, durable, and efficient temperature-controlled solutions you can trust.

Name: AGD Systems Limited
Description:
About AGD Systems Limited
AGD Systems is one of the UK’s leading manufacturers of ITS product solutions. AGD makes easy-to-integrate, globally compatible ITS product solutions designed to help create safer, greener, more efficient traffic and transport environments. AGD’s solutions are created for smart cities, smart highways and strategic transport initiatives around the world, and are the result of strategic ITS thinking strengthened by 25 years of practical implementations.

Working closely with system and product integrators, national road authorities and traffic engineers, AGD develops solutions that fit today’s needs and tomorrow’s challenges across urban and inter-urban settings. Products serve traffic and pedestrian control, highways and enforcement environments, and applications such as tunnel and track. 

AGD Systems is part of The Traffic Group (TTG).  Formerly AGD Group Limited, the name change reflects the growth in the business, expansion through recent acquisitions and a product range that increasingly addresses the wider needs of the traffic market. TTG has a portfolio of businesses focused on product solutions designed to help create safer, greener and more efficient traffic and transport environments.

The group has two core offerings:

•	Advanced low-power radar, electro-optical sensors and ANPR/surveillance cameras for Intelligent Traffic Systems. Applications include traffic and pedestrian control, highways monitoring, air quality/emissions measurement, parking systems and enforcement
•	A comprehensive range of portable traffic signals suitable for applications ranging from simple two-way deployment through to complex, UTC-integrated temporary junction schemes

For further information please contact:

Ian Hind, Commercial Director, AGD Systems - +44 (0) 1452 854212, ian.hind@agd-systems.com

Name: SIMM.PRO
Description:
SIMM.PRO – Uma Plataforma, Infinitas Conexões.
O SIMM.PRO é uma solução de software brasileira que transforma a gestão da comunicação audiovisual em ambientes de mobilidade urbana e transporte público. Projetado para operar em trens, metrôs, VLTs, aeroportos e terminais, o SIMM.PRO centraliza o controle de todos os sistemas de comunicação embarcados e fixos, permitindo uma operação unificada, resiliente e eficiente, mesmo com falhas de rede ou perda de conexão com o centro de comando.

O SIMM.PRO é classificado como um NG-PIS (Next Generation Passenger Information System), atendendo aos três pilares fundamentais dessa nova geração de sistemas:

- Evolução: plataforma baseada em software, compatível com tecnologias legadas e modernas, garantindo longevidade e flexibilidade.

- Distribuição: operação federada entre veículos e estações, com autonomia local e capacidade de comando remoto, mantendo a operação mesmo desconectada.

- Unificação: uma única interface para o operador controlar áudio, monitores, interfonia, painéis de mensagens variáveis (PMVs) e demais canais de comunicação.

Sua arquitetura modular e aberta garante integração com uma ampla gama de equipamentos e tecnologias de diferentes fabricantes, como Axis, Bosch, Dante (Audinate), Dahua, Zenitel, Samsung, LG Electronics, 2N, Apel, Hanwha, Spider Leds, entre muitos outros — assegurando liberdade de escolha e padronização da operação.

Embora seu foco principal seja o setor de transporte e mobilidade urbana, o SIMM.PRO também é aplicável em ambientes como aeroportos, centros de eventos, hotelaria, varejo, segurança e educação, onde a comunicação audiovisual integrada é essencial.

Name: Mi-Jack Europe GmbH
Description:
Formerly known as Yardeye, Mi-Jack Europe is committed to advancing work zone protection and efficiency for ports and intermodal terminals worldwide.

In 2022, Yardeye was acquired by Mi-Jack, the industry leader in Rubber Tired Gantry (RTG) Cranes, container handling machinery, and technology for port and intermodal facilities. Yardeye’s RFID and GNSS-based equipment, personnel Real Time Locating System (RTLS), and Collision Avoidance System (CAS) fit seamlessly into Mi-Jack’s Mi-Star technology platform, which provides everything from differential GPS automated steering and GPS inventory management to virtualized operations view and centralized fleet management.

Combining both companies’ skilled and experienced technology groups into one facilitates continued innovation and excellence for automation, collision avoidance, and work zone protection within ports and intermodal terminals.

Mi-Jack Europe is located in Karlsruhe Germany.

Name: eMobility R&D Center - LUMS Pakistan
Description:
The LUMS eMobility Research and Development Center aims to:

• Facilitate faster adoption of electric vehicles in Pakistan and achieve country targets for EV sales by 2030
• Reduce Pakistan's carbon footprint and urban air pollution by eliminating vehicular exhaust emissions
• Decrease Pakistan's reliance on imported fossil fuels for the transportation sector
• Provide latest technological trends and market information to Pakistan's emerging EV industry
• Support the development of EV related manufacturing, policies, regulations, and standards suitable for Pakistan
• Provide technical services and quality assurance certification to local EV firms to help reduce startup and manufacturing costs

OUR VISION
To become Pakistan's premiere resource for EV technology development, testing, and calibration services

OUR MISSION
A GREENER ENVIRONMENT
Through our initiatives, we strive to minimize polluting emissions, improve energy efficiency, and promote a healthier and greener environment for all

The Lahore University of Management Sciences (LUMS), in partnership with USAID Power Sector Improvement Activity (PSIA), has established an eMobility Research and Development (R&D) Center that aims to serve as a cutting-edge facility dedicated to battery and motor testing for electric vehicles in Pakistan.

The Center’s primary goal is to combat the increasing climate crisis in Pakistan. The transport sector, a major contributor to greenhouse gas emissions and urban air pollution, predominantly relies on gasoline-powered vehicles, resulting in deteriorating air quality, increasing respiratory problems, and rising oil import bills.

This grant assistance has been made possible by the support of the American people through USAID. The contents of this website are the sole responsibility of LUMS and do not reflect the views of USAID or the United States Government.

Headquartered in Twin Lakes, Wisconsin, Five Star Fabricating, Inc. is an advanced manufacturer, specializing in the forming/fabricating of polycarbonate & acrylic windows, advanced composites, and thermoformed plastics.

Over 40 years ago we stemmed our roots from the high-performance automotive racing industry, and became experts in manufacturing large, complex composite body panels and windshields that require both structural integrity and aesthetic quality.  We are proud to have emerged into a wider variety of industries and markets, including Transportation, Automotive, Mass Transit, Personal Protection, Defense, Aerospace, Heavy Equipment, and Construction & Agriculture. 

We are dedicated to technical innovation, professional performance and providing uncompromising quality parts and unmatched customer service!

Poskytujeme kvalitní služby v oblasti technologií pro předcházení námraze a náledí na nebezpečných úsecích silnic a dálnic ČR, jsme výhradním dodavatelem systému automatického postřiku solankou.

Name: VERS
Description:
Based in the Netherlands, VERS designs, develops, and delivers complete bicycle programs for partners across Europe and beyond.
We combine smart design, durable engineering, and reliable production to make mobility solutions scalable, high-quality, and easy to implement.

We help cities, campuses, and employers source and launch reliable bicycle fleets with hardware, software integration, and service-ready configurations. Each delivery is supported by certified local partners and includes clear KPIs, technical documentation, and flexible branding options.

Alongside these programs, we collaborate with brands, OEMs, and mobility operators to produce private-label and fleet-ready bicycles. Our in-house design and sourcing teams oversee the full process from concept and engineering to assembly and quality control, ensuring every model meets European standards for safety, performance, and style.

Each VERS model is built for long service life, straightforward maintenance, and branding flexibility. Our production network supports both small pilot runs and large-scale rollouts with consistent quality and reliable lead times.

At VERS, we believe bicycles should be dependable, easy to service, and built to last. That’s why every model follows a circular lifecycle approach with refurbishment, certified recycling, and digital product passports for full traceability.

Whether you’re expanding a fleet, launching a new mobility program, or looking for a trusted production partner, our bikes are ready to ride and ready to grow.

Name: Gaither Tool Co.
Description:
Gaither Tool Co., Inc., founded in 1988, is an international organization committed to serving the tire and trucking industry. It invents and manufactures convenient tools and systems needed to service and maintain tires and wheel assemblies.

Gaither Tool Co., Inc., continually invests in research and development to bring to its customers the most effective tools in the business. It strives to improve efficiency and reduce costs for customers all over the world working in truck maintenance shops as well as on-the-road tire service providers including Bandag, Euromaster / Michelin, Bridgestone’s First Stop, and the United States Armed Forces just to name a few.

Gaither supplies products to customers in over 100 countries, selling through exclusive and nonexclusive distributors. Gaither Tool Co., Inc. is headquartered in Jacksonville, Illinois, U.S.A. In 1997 it opened a branch office located in Roosendaal, Holland to better serve the European market. In 1999 that office was incorporated in Holland and Gaither Europe BV was started. Gaither’s manufacturing plant and warehousing for International distribution is located in Taichung, Taiwan.

Description:
Imaginez à partir d’une page blanche : c’est là que tout commence avec nous.

Chez Bâches Thuillet, nous ne faisons pas que fabriquer des bâches. Nous concevons, réparons, équipons et valorisons les véhicules de transport, en proposant une offre globale à haute valeur ajoutée.

 Notre mission : protéger, personnaliser et prolonger la durée de vie de vos véhicules grâce à des solutions textiles sur mesure, du marquage publicitaire et des services de carrosserie de qualité.

 Nos expertises complémentaires :
• Confection de bâches sur mesure pour tous types de véhicules et structures
• Marquage publicitaire haute qualité (visibilité, branding, covering…)
• Réparation, reconditionnement et travaux de carrosserie
• Accessoires techniques : sanglons, bandes anti-effraction, kits de fixation…

Fondée en 1977 et implantée dans l’Oise, notre entreprise familiale emploie plus de 60 collaborateurs, répartis entre les pôles production, commercial et administratif.

 Dotés d’un atelier moderne et d’outils de production performants, nous travaillons aux côtés des plus grands constructeurs européens, en France comme à l’étranger.

 Ce qui nous distingue :
Une approche sur-mesure, au service de vos contraintes métiers
Une qualité de fabrication exigeante, avec des matériaux durables
Une réactivité éprouvée, au service de vos délais.

 Transporteurs, carrossiers, industriels, constructeurs : faites appel à une équipe engagée, agile et experte pour tous vos projets de protection, rénovation et équipement.

Valores:

2.	Qualidade: Comprometemo-nos a fornecer produtos e serviços de alta qualidade.
3.	Inovação: Buscamos constantemente a inovação em nossos produtos e processos.
4.	Eficiência: Nos esforçamos para oferecer soluções de transporte eficientes que atendam às necessidades de nossos clientes.

6.	Tradição: Valorizamos nossa longa história e experiência no setor de implementos rodoviários desde 1962.

At Blue Spot Autowerks, our mission is to improve the driving experience for Porsche enthusiasts worldwide by seamlessly tailoring the performance of these iconic sports cars. We are devoted to advancing performance and aesthetic allure where the manufacturer's ingenuity concludes. Committed to pushing the boundaries of automotive excellence, we specialize in crafting precision-engineered and innovative tuning solutions that elevate Porsche vehicles to new heights. 

Driven by a passion for performance and an unwavering commitment to quality, we see our role as a continuation of the manufacturer's vision. We strive to empower drivers with unparalleled speed, agility, and style, building upon the foundation laid by Porsche's iconic design and engineering. 

At Blue Spot Autowerks, we embrace the challenge of optimizing Porsche vehicles beyond their factory specifications. Our relentless pursuit of automotive perfection fuels our commitment to providing enthusiasts with cutting-edge performance parts that seamlessly integrate with the manufacturer's legacy, unlocking the full potential of their Porsche sports cars. 

We are not just suppliers of performance parts; we are partners in the ongoing evolution of Porsche driving. Join us on this exhilarating journey, as we continue development where the manufacturer stopped, unlocking new realms of Porsche performance together.

Small bag feeding stations

Food ingredients
Lithium battery anode and cathode
Pharmaceutical intermediates

Name: HeckTeam
Description:
In a constantly evolving world, one thing remains unchanged: the need for solutions that revolutionize the transport, organization, and protection of valuable equipment. Our mission is to deliver exactly those solutions – for every industry, every application, and every challenge.

Whether it’s flight cases for the secure transport of racing equipment, functional cases that double as mobile workstations, or presentation cases tailored to the specific demands of the pharmaceutical industry – our products set the standard. Research institutions handling highly sensitive devices, public organizations with unique requirements, the fast-paced events industry with its creative visions, or even niche areas like astronomers – we provide the perfect solution for every need.

Our cases are more than just transport tools. They are mobile workspaces, presentation platforms, and storage systems, uniting functionality, quality, and design at the highest level. From aviation to medicine, research to entertainment, our clients rely on us to keep their equipment safe, organized, and always ready for action.

Every one of our products helps industries and individuals worldwide save time, work more efficiently, and turn ideas into reality faster. Our cases support their users in laboratories, on stages, and even in the most remote corners of the earth – wherever they are needed.

With experience, expertise, and a commitment to innovation, we bridge the gap between our customers' needs and the challenges of the future. Together, we create solutions that enable productivity and success across every industry – reliable, innovative, and ready to push boundaries.

Name: Hyra Lifts
Description:
When it comes to reliable and high-performance material handling equipment, Hyra stands as India’s leading tail lift manufacturer. With over seven years of expertise in the industry, we are committed to delivering cutting-edge solutions tailored to the needs of industrial and commercial applications. From cantilever tail lifts to portable forklifts, our wide range of products is engineered for efficiency, durability, and user convenience.

Why Choose Hyra for Tail Lifts and Material Handling Equipment?
1. Diverse Product Range
Hyra offers an extensive selection of material handling solutions to cater to a variety of needs:

High-Capacity Cantilever Tail Lifts: Designed for heavy-duty lifting tasks with unmatched stability and precision.
Gas Cylinder Lifts: Specialized for safe and efficient handling of gas cylinders.
Column Tail Lifts: Ideal for vehicles with limited space, providing vertical lifting efficiency.
Portable Forklifts: Compact and versatile for small-scale lifting tasks.
Electric Forklifts: Energy-efficient solutions for industrial usage.
2. Proven Experience
With more than seven years of expertise in manufacturing material handling equipment, we have honed our skills to deliver products that meet international quality standards. Our equipment is trusted by businesses in over 10 countries, a testament to our commitment to excellence.

3. Tailored Solutions
We understand that every business has unique requirements. That’s why Hyra offers customizable solutions to ensure our equipment perfectly fits your operational needs.

4. On-Site Service
Unlike traditional manufacturers, Hyra brings top-notch lifting solutions directly to your location. There’s no need to send your vehicle to us—our products and services are designed to integrate seamlessly into your existing operations.

Name: Fontaine Fifth Wheel - Mexico
Description:
Fontaine Fifth Wheel es el fabricante de quintas ruedas más grande del mundo y el innovador del único sistema de cierre autoajustable en la industria: el Fontaine No-Slack. Con plantas de producción certificadas bajo ISO/TS 16949:2009 en todo el mundo, la empresa divide su organización global en dos grupos operativos: America y Europa.

Fontaine Fifth Wheel Norteamérica tiene su sede principal  en Jasper, Alabama , donde además de las oficinas corporativas,  alberga el centro de investigación y desarrollo más grande del mundo enfocado exclusivamente en tecnología de acoplamiento de quintas ruedas. Allí, los ingenieros perfeccionan las líneas de productos existentes mientras imaginan, diseñan y hacen prototipos para las quintas ruedas del futuro.

Las soluciones que ofrecemos se desarrollan con un enfoque absoluto en el cliente y se adaptan para satisfacer los requisitos específicos de una amplia gama de aplicaciones, desde estándar hasta de trabajo severo. Las quintas ruedas fijas, deslizables y bloqueadas que entregamos cuentan con el avanzado sistema No-Slack de ajuste automático. Esto es importante para nuestros clientes porque una de las principales causas de desgaste en las quintas ruedas es el juego entre el perno rey muela y cuña . Este juego transmite ondas de choque a través del chasis mientras el vehículo circula por las carreteras bajo carga. A su vez, esto causa un desgaste prematuro de los componentes e incluso fallas; y los constantes golpes resultan molestos e incómodos para los conductores.

La tecnología No-Slack de Fontaine resuelve este problema ajustando automáticamente el juego de la quinta rueda para lograr una conexión firme y segura que compensa el desgaste. Los clientes se benefician de esta tecnología avanzada que extiende la vida útil del producto mientras reduce el mantenimiento, brindando a los administradores de flotas un menor costo operativo por milla y a los conductores una experiencia de manejo más suave y cómoda.

Name: Smartloading
Description:
Smartloading est un nouveau dispositif de manutention conçu pour faciliter le chargement et le déchargement des camions.
Smartloading est une plateforme de chargement de camion transportable par un chariot élévateur frontal pour la mise à niveau de gerbeurs / chariots électriques / transpalettes (seuls ou chargés).

Smartloading est un dispositif simple, intelligent, facilement mis en œuvre, peu encombrant et peu coûteux.

Smartloading est une alternative : 
- au quai de chargement
- à la table élévatrice
- à la rampe mobile
- au camion avec hayon

Pourquoi utiliser Smartloading :
- Pour transporter dans le camion :
     - votre chariot électrique électrique afin de déplacer de lourdes charges (CNAMTS R 367)
     - votre gerbeur afin de gerber / dé-gerber vos palettes
     - en une seule manipulation votre transpalette chargé d'une palette

- Pour charger / décharger des camions les gerbeurs, chariots électriques et transpalettes...

Les avantages de Smartloading sont nombreux :
- Respect de la législation  (respect du code de travail selon les articles R 4541-1 à 4541-10, L 4121-2 et D 4161-2 qui visent à réduire la pénibilité au travail des salariés et recommandation CNAMTS R 367 : limitation des tractions manuelles des palettes (poussée ou traction) à 600 kg pour un homme et 360 kg pour une femme).
- Gains de productivité
- Economies
- Facilité d'utilisation
- Sécurité du personnel
- Responsabilité
- sécurité du matériel
- Longévité

Caractéristiques techniques :
- Dispositif certifié CE et supervisé par SOCOTEC
- Conforme à la Directive machine 98/37
- Fabriqué 100% en aluminium (poids à vide de 77 kg) en France
- Pont antidérapant strié, 2 poignets de chaque côté de la plate-forme.
- Charge maximale utile : 2500 kg
Longueur = 2.23 m
Largeur = 1 m
Hauteur = 19.5 cm
Livré avec 1 sangle de sécurité
